claim: Fact Check: Umujyanama w'u Bubiligi ntiyigeze asaba abaturage b'u Bubiligi kuva mu Bubiligi cyangwa mu Burayi
evidence: Umujyanama yasabye abantu barakariwe n'imyambarire ya Kiyisilamu mu gace k'imigi ya Bruxelles kuba mu kindi gice cy'umurwa mukuru w'u Bubiligi, aho gusaba abaturage b'u Bubiligi kuva mu gihugu cyangwa mu Burayi, bitandukanye n'ibyo abantu benshi batanga kuri interineti.Ifoto y'amasegonda 25 ya Saliha Raiss uvuga mu nama y'inama yabereye i Molenbeek-Saint-Jean ku wa 27 Kanama yasohotse kuri Instagram avuga ko yasabye "U Burayi butariho Abaturayi".Ku wa 1 Nzeri, hatangajwe inkuru nshya y'urugero rwa Raiss, aho yavuze ko: "Abatemera abagore bambitswe imyambaro cyangwa idini rya Isilamu mu Bubiligi bagomba kuva mu gihugu cyabo!Reuters ImageElon Musk, yatangajwe ko yatangaje inkuru nshya kuri X ifite umutwe uvuga ngo: Abanyamubiligi bavuye mu Bubiligi! Ibi birasa n'ibisazi. Ibi birasa n'ibisazi birenze miriyoni 42.

claim: Mu Ukuboza 2025, Amerika na Palau basinye amasezerano y'amadolari agera kuri miriyoni 7.5 y'amadolari, azatuma Amerika yohereza abantu 75 batabazwa muri icyo kirwa.
evidence: Mu Ukuboza 2025, hari ikirego cyaswiragijwe ku mbuga nkoranyambaga kivuga ko igihugu cy'ikirwa cya Palau cyasinye amasezerano y'amadolari miriyoni 7.5 na leta ya Amerika yo kwakira abantu 75 batavanwa mu byabo. Abenshi mu bakoreshaga urubuga nkoranyambaga (babitswe, barashyizwe mu bushyinguro, barashyizwe mu bushyinguro), kandi ibivugwa n'ibinyamakuru bitandukanye byatangaje ko ari ukuri.

claim: Ikirombe cyumye gishobora gukiza ibisebe byo mu kanwa
evidence: Nubwo uburozi bw'umunwa bwinshi buva mu kanwa bukira ubwabyo, imiti isanzwe yo ku rwego rwo hejuru ikoreshwa mu gihe cy'ubuvuzi, akenshi igaragaza ibimenyetso. Ibikomere binini, bikomeje kandi bikunze kugaruka bisaba ubuvuzi bwihariye cyane bugamije guhosha ibimenyetso, kugabanya igihe cy'uburozi, no kuzamura imibereho myiza y'umurwayi muri rusange. Ku bw'ibyo, uburozi bwumye ntibukwiye gufatwa nk'uburyo bwo kwivuza bwiringirwa mu gihe cyo guhangana n'ibikomere byo mu kanwa.

claim: Igihe Nijeriya yabonaga ubwigenge, abaturage bo mu migi yariyongereyeho bagera kuri miriyoni 7.
evidence: Mu 1960, Nijeriya yahawe ubwigenge bwa politiki nk'igihugu cyigenga mu Itegeko Nshinga ryo mu 1960, riteganya uburyo bw'ubutegetsi bw'ibanze, imigi 3 (Amajyaruguru, Uburasirazuba n'Uburengerazuba), urwego rw'amategeko rw'amajwi abiri mu nzego z'ibanze (Inama Nyobozi n'Inama y'Abadepite) n'intara (Inama y'Inteko Nyobozi n'Inama y'Abadepite) n'ubutegetsi bw'ibanze (Inama y'Inteko Nyobozi n'Inama y'Abadepite) bufite ububasha bw'ubutegetsi bw'ibanze bugabanyijemo ibice bitatu cyangwa urutonde rw'abategetsi  abirinda, abirinda n'abasigaye.Dr Nnamdi Azikiwe yashyizwe ku mwanya wa Guverineri Mukuru w'iyo shyirahamwe, naho Tafawa Balewa akomeza kuba umukuru w'igihugu cyigenga cya elegitorero rya demokarasi, ariko ubu kikaba gifite ubutegetsi bw'ikirenga.

claim: Walgreens yatangiye kugurisha amakarita ya Hallmark Mahogany, ari yo marangi y'amakarita y'ishimwe agenewe abirabura gusa, muri Kanama 2025 cyangwa ahagana muri uwo mwaka.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo, Walgreens yashyize ku rubuga rwayo ibikoresho by'ubwoko bwa Hallmark Mahogany, ifite uburyo bwo gutoragura ibicuruzwa mu iduka, mu gihe cyo kwandika iyi nkuru. Hallmark yavuze ku rubuga rwayo ko Mahogany ari "ikigo cy'ingenzi cyane cy'amakarita kiboneka ku bakiriya b'Abanyarwanda".Nubwo Hallmark yagiriyeho abakiriya b'Abanyarwanda amakarita yayo ya Mahogany, nta gihamya twabonye ko iyo sosiyete yabujije abandi bakiriya kugura. Ntibyumvikanaga mu gihe cyo kwandika iyi nkuru igihe Walgreens yatangiriye kugura amakarita y'ubwoko bwa Mahogany.Ibitekerezo byo kuri interineti byo muri Kanama 2025 byavugaga ko Walgreens "yatangiye" kugurisha amakarita. claim: Sunil Gavaskar yavuze ko "Virat Kohli yiga gusa ku mupira wa Anushka [Sharma] mu gihe cy'igifungo"

claim: Umuhanga mu bya siyansi akaba n'umwarimu Carl Sagan yigeze kuvuga ati "umuti w'impaka zidakwiriye ni impaka nziza, si ukwirengagiza ibitekerezo".
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo cy'igitekerezo cy'ibanze, iyi mvugo yavuye mu nyandiko yitwa "Abatutsi nyakuri bibaza ibibazo", Sagan akaba yarayanditse hamwe na Ann Druyan, umupfakazi we akaba ari na we ukunda gukorana na we. Kubera ko Sagan na Druyan bakoranye mu kwandika iyo nyandiko, ntibishoboka ko habaho umwanditsi umwe w'iyo nyandiko. Mu gihe cy'imyaka myinshi, abakoresha interineti bagiye bashyira hamwe amagambo avuga uko barwanya imvugo mbi, bakabishyira ku muyobozi w'ishami akaba n'umwigisha Carl Sagan, wapfuye mu mwaka wa 1996.

claim: Ibishushanyo biboneka muri Israel bigaragaza icyicaro gikuru cya Mossad kirimo gutwika nyuma y'igitero cya vuba aha cya Irani.

claim: Umuhanzi Josh Groban yahanganye na Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump amusaba ko band yakina indirimbo izwi cyane "You Raise Me Up".
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo Hari ikinyoma cyakwirakwiriye ku rubuga rwa interineti mu kwezi k'Ugushyingo 2025 cyavuze ko umuhanzi Josh Groban yahanganye na Perezida wa Amerika Donald Trump kubera ko yasabye itsinda ry'abahanzi gukina indirimbo izwi cyane yitwa "You Raise Me Up". Groban yahimbye indirimbo mu 2003. Itsinda rya Secret Garden ry'Abanyayirilande n'Abanorwayokazi mu ntangiriro ryanditse kandi rikora indirimbo yitwa "You Raise Me Up" mu 2001.

claim: Umuyobozi mukuru w'ingabo z'indege AP Singh yavuze ko yagabishije leta y'u Burayi ku byerekeye indege za Tejas, avuga ko abapilote ba IAF boherezwa muri Pakistan kugira ngo bajye gutozwa.
evidence: Video y'ibinyoma y'Umuyobozi Mukuru w'Ingabo z'Amerika, AP Singh, aho agaragara ko yavuze ko yari yaburiye leta y'u Buhinde ku birebana no kudashyira indege y'intambara ya Tejas mu ngabo z'indege z'u Buhinde (IAF), ikomeje kugenda nk'ukuri. Muri iyo video, Singh agaragara ko agereranya indege ya Tejas, indege yo mu bwoko bw'abahinde yo mu bwoko bw'indege z'intambara (LCA), n'igikombe cy'inyamaswa cyo mu bwoko bw'Abahinde, ari cyo samosa bitewe n'uko ifite imiterere. BOOM yabonye ko iyo videwo yashyizweho binyuze mu ikoranabuhanga rya AI.

claim: Umubare w'abapolisi wagabanutse igihe umuyobozi w'ishyaka ry'igihugu Judith Collins yari Minisitiri w'abapolisi.
evidence: Imibare ya Polisi ya Nouvelle-Zélande igaragaza ko umubare w'abapolisi nyuma yaho wazamutse ugera ku 8.643 muri Kamena 2009 na 8.707 muri Kamena 2010, mbere yo kugabanuka ugera ku 8.638 muri Kamena 2011.

claim: Royal Bengal Tiger igenda mu ishyamba rya Mankar mu burasirazuba bwa Burdwan
evidence: Videwo ivuga ko igaragaza ingwe y'i Bengal igenda mu ishyamba rya Mankar mu burasirazuba bwa Burdwan, iri gukwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Iyi clip iri gusohoka nk'ibyaherukaga kubonwa mu ntara ya West Bengal. Igeragezwa rigaragaza ko iyi video imaze imyaka myinshi kandi ko ari iya mbere yanditswe muri Andhra Pradesh. Umukoresha wa Facebook yashyize hanze iyo videwo ifite amagambo akurikira: "Ingwe yabonetse mu ishyamba rya Mankar igumana n'inyamaswa: ingwe yabonetse mu ishyamba rya Mankar".

claim: Muri Kanama 2025, impuguke zavuze ko "ibishwi bya Frankenstein" byanduye bifite intoki cyangwa amahembe ku maso yabibonetse i Fort Collins muri Colorado, "byateye" Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika.
evidence: Hari virusi nyayo yavumbuwe muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, ubu hakaba hashize hafi ikinyejana kimwe, izwi ku mbuga nkoranyambaga nk'umugera wa Shope Papilloma, utera inkoko zo mu gasozi z'abanyamaswa, ugatuma zikuraho ibishyimbo cyangwa amahembe ku ruhu rwazo.Mu buryo bunyuranye n'ibyo abantu batangaza ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, gukwirakwira kwa virusi si bishya kandi inkoko zanduye ntizi "gutera" muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika.Iyo virusi nta kaga ifite ku zindi nyamaswa, harimo n'abantu.Muri Kanama 2025, abantu ku mbuga nkoranyambaga batangiye gusobanura ibintu bisa n'aho ari filime y'urugomo byabayeho. "Abahanga batanga umuburo ku nkoko zanduye 'Frankenstein' zirimwo intanga z'ibishyimbo z'ibirizo zitera mu gasozi.Izi nkoko zo mu gasozi z'ibinyabuzima zabonetse zigenda ziza mu bice by'uruhu rw'amaboko mu mugi wa Fort Collins, muri leta ya Colorado

claim: Urubanza rwo gupfa kwa Nimisha Priya umurwayi wo muri Kerala, rwashyizwe ahagaragara n'ubutegetsi bwa Yemeni.
evidence: Videwo yashyizwe ahagaragara ku wa Kabiri, irimo umuvugabutumwa akaba n'uwashinze Global Peace Initiative Dr KA Paul, aho ashobora kumvikana avuga ko igihano cy'urupfu cy'umuforomokazi wo muri Kerala Nimisha Priya cyakuweho n'ubutegetsi bwa Yemeni, ikwirakwizwa cyane ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. "Ndashaka gushimira abayobozi bose bagize uruhare mu gutuma ibyo bikorwa bigira icyo bigeraho.

claim: Polisi yo mu ntara ya West Bengal yarasabye abantu guterwa amabuye kubera ko yananiwe guhagarika ikamyo yari itwaye umucanga n'amabuye.
evidence: Videwo igaragaza abapolisi birasa amabuye ku modoka z'ibicuruzwa zikorerwamo imizigo, iherutse kujya ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Muri ayo mashusho, abantu babona amabuye aterwa ku modoka zikorerwamo imizigo, zikomeza kugenda zitaretse. Videwo ikwirakwizwa ivuga ko igaragaza abapolisi bo muri West Bengal birasa amabuye nyuma yo kunanirwa guhagarika imodoka irimo umucanga n'amabuye. Umukoresha wa Facebook yashyize kuri iyo post iyo nkuru igira iti: #West Bengal - abapolisi batinze guhagarika imodoka irimo amabuye y'umwanda ... #West Bengal - abapolisi badashoboye guhagarika imodoka z'amabuye y'umwanda zikomeje guhiga amabuye ... Ushobora kureba iyo post hano. FACT CHECK NewsMobile yabonye ko iyo post yarimo amabuye kandi ko ibyo ivuga ari ibinyoma.

claim: Tetanus ishobora kwicwa ikoresheje peroxyde kandi igakwirakwizwa gusa binyuze ku nyamaswa
evidence: "Tetanus ni imwe mu nkingo zisekeje kurusha izindi zose zabaho, " ni ko amagambo yo mu ishusho yashyizwe ahagaragara ku itariki ya 30 Nyakanga 2025 kuri Instagram avuga. Iyo mvugo, na yo ikaba yarakwirakwijwe kuri Facebook na X, ikomeza ivuga ko gushyira perokside ku gikomere bizakuraho ingaruka z'ubwandu kandi ko indwara ya tetanus "ivamo mu nda z'inyamaswa". claim: Shah Rukh Khan avuga ko Mustafizur Rahman azakina na KKR nubwo hari abamurwanya kandi agahakana umuhanga mu by'inganda Gautam Adani.
evidence: Videwo ikwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga igaragaza umukinnyi wa Bollywood akaba n'umukozi wa Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) Shah Rukh Khan bivugwa ko arwanira umukinnyi wa cricket w'Ubushinwa Mustafizur Rahman mu KKR, mu gihe yiyamiriza cyane umuhanga mu by'inganda Gautam Adani na "politiki y'Abahindu n'Abisilamu". Muri iyo clip, Shah Rukh Khan bivugwa ko yumvikanishijwe avuga ko abavuga ko Mustafizur Rahman atagomba kurenga, bagatangaza ko Adani yagambaniye u Buhinde abikuye mu gutanga amashanyarazi muri Bangladesh, kandi akomeza gushikama ku by'uko Mustafizur "azakina rwose KKR". Iyi video irimo gusomwa cyane n'abantu benshi ivuga ko ari amagambo Shah Rukh Khan yavuze aherutse gukwirakwira ko Mustafizur Rahman yakuwe muri KKR.

claim: Muri icyo gihe cy'ibyumweru bine cy'ukwezi kwa Werurwe 2026, Abanyamerika benshi bishwe i Chicago kurusha abishwe mu ntambara kuva intambara hagati ya Amerika na Isirayeli itangira.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyi ngingo, amakuru yatanzwe ni yo meza cyane ku buryo ubu ari bwo bwandikwa, kandi ashobora kuba ataragaragaza urupfu rw'abantu batigeze bamenyekana cyangwa bataramenyekana.Mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa Werurwe 2026, ikinyoma cyakwirakwiriye ku mbuga nkoranyambaga cy'uko Abanyamerika benshi bishwe mu mujyi wa Chicago mu byumweru bine mbere y'uko icyo gitekerezo gitangira gukwirakwira, kurusha abishwe mu ntambara hagati ya Amerika na Isirayeli na Iran.Iyi ntambara yatangiye mu mpera za Gashyantare, kandi ubu ikaba iri mu gihe cy'ikirango cy'amahoro.Abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bashyize icyo gitekerezo kuri X (cyashyizwe mu nkiko) na Facebook (cyashyizwe mu nkiko), nubwo byasaga n'aho byaturutse kuri Erick Eson wiyise "umuvugabutumwa w'ukuri w'umunyamwete".Umunyamakuru w'umukristo yashyize kuri Instagram (cyashyizwe mu nkiko) ku itariki ya 25 Werurwe, aho yavuze ko mu itangazamakuru ryavuze ko abantu benshi cyane baguye mu gitero cyabaye mu gihe cy'intambara cya Amerika.

claim: Igikombe cya mbere cy'urubura cyatangiye kubaho mu buryo bw'impanuka, igihe hari umuntu wageragezaga gukora urumuri rw'umuriro.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyo ntego, Erwin Perzy I, umunyabikoresho by'ubuvuzi mu mujyi wa Vienne, yagerageje gukoresha umubumbe w'ibirahuri wuzuye amazi ahagana mu mwaka wa 1900 kugira ngo yongere umuco igihe hari ibindi bice byongeraga igipimo cy'umuraba byagabanutse nk'urubura. Uko bigaragara, ingaruka y'"umuraba" yabaye itaragera, nyuma yaho ahindura igitekerezo cyaba umubumbe w'ibyibutsa. Ikigenda gitunguranye cya Perzy si cyo kigereranyo cya mbere kizwi cy'icyo gitekerezo. Raporo ya leta ya Amerika yo mu 1878 ku iserukiramuco ry'i Paris ryabayeho ku isi hose yagaragaje ko ibipimo by'ibiro byakozwe n'ibirahuri byuzuye amazi byakozwe mu mabuye y'ibirahuri byuzuye amazi, byatangaga ingaruka nk'iy'inkubi y'umuyaga w'urubura iyo byasimbutse.

claim: Mu Kuboza 2025, Umuyobozi w'Abaneshyaka muri Sena ya Amerika, Chuck Schumer, yavuze ko "Go Bills", yerekeza ku ikipe ya NFL yo mu mugi wa Buffalo muri leta ya New York, mbere yo kuvuga ku bwicanyi bwabereye i Sydney muri Australia no kuri kaminuza ya Brown.
evidence: Nubwo Snopes atashoboye kubona amashusho yose y'ikoraniro ry'abanyamakuru, nta gihamya twabonye y'uko videwo ya videwo y'ibyo Schumer yavuze yari yarahindutse. Mu gihe cy'ikintu nk'icyo, Schumer yavuze mu buryo burambuye ku byerekeye amasasu yabereye muri Ositaraliya no kuri Brown University. Mu Ukuboza 2025, videwo yasohotse ku mbuga nkoranyambaga (yaritswe hano, hano n'aha) igaragaza ko umuyobozi w'abaminisitiri bo muri Sena ya Amerika Chuck Schumer yavuze ati "Genda Bills", yerekeza ku ikipe ya Buffalo, New York, NFL, mbere yo kuvuga ku masasu y'abicanyi yabereye muri Sydney, muri Ositaraliya no kuri Brown University. Amasasu yo mu mpera z'icyumweru gishize.

claim: Abagize ikipe y'Abasirikare ba Amerika y'Abaholandi bahatanira imikino Olempike bahawe ifunguro ry'ibiryo byihuse rya McDonald's mu gihe bari basuye White House muri Gashyantare 2026.
evidence: Ku itariki ya 24 Gashyantare 2026, ikipe y'abagabo ba USA mu mikino ya Olempike yo gukinisha heza yasuye Inzu y'Abanyamerika, aho bahuriye na Perezida Donald Trump mu birori byo kwizihiza intsinzi y'umudari wa zahabu yahawe na Canada.Amafoto (yarambuwe) yashyizwe kuri interineti bivugwa ko agaragaza abagize ikipe barya ifunguro ry'ibyokurya byihuse rya McDonald's mu Nzu y'Abanyamerika.Amafoto agaragaza iyi kipe yicaye ku meza, bambaye imidari yabo y'izahabu mu gihe bari kurya imboga.Hari abantu bagereranyije iyo videwo n'imwe mu makipe y'abagore ba Olempike ya Amerika, bivugwa ko yari ifunguriwe ifunguro ry'igikundiro n'umukinnyi Stanley Tucci.Amafoto ari hejuru ni ay'ukuri kandi yabanje gushyirwa ahagaragara na Perezida Scarlett Johnson, umushyitsi wa podcast ufite konti ya X akunze avuga ko ari "umunyamakuru mushya wa White House".Twagerageje gushyikira Johnson kugira ngo tumenye byinshi kandi dushyire

evidence: Ku birebana n'iyo ngingo, inteko ishinga amategeko ya Texas yasenye itegeko ryabuzanyaga guhagarika abanyeshuri batagira aho baba n'abanyeshuri bo mu mashuri yo hasi, keretse mu bihe by'icyiciro cya mbere, bishobora kuba bikubiyemo ibiyobyabwenge, intwaro cyangwa urugomo... ... claim: Leta ya Ohio yemeje itegeko rihana kwambara imideli, imyenda cyangwa ibice by'umubiri by'imyanya ndangagitsina bigaragaza "ubwoko butandukanye n'ubwoko bw'umuntu w'imideli cyangwa uw'imyidagaduro", mu by'ukuri ribuza ko abantu batereka abantu.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo, Inteko Ishinga Amategeko ya Ohio yemeye itegeko nk'iryo, imyanzuro y'amajwi 6332.Ijambo ry'iryo tegeko ryanditse ribuza ko abantu bakwirakwiza imyerekano mu ruhame, keretse gusa iyo ari iy'abantu bakuru gusa, urugero nk'inzu zo guswera.Nyamara...iri tegeko ntiriherwa n'Inama Nkuru ya Ohio cyangwa ngo ryemezwe n'Umuyobozi wa Repubulika Mike DeWine, nk'uko byari bimeze kuri iyi nyandiko.Ibinyoma by'uko leta ya Ohio yemeye itegeko rihanagura gukoresha ubwiza, imyambaro cyangwa ibice by'umubiri by'imikorere kugira ngo ryumvikanishe "ubwoko butandukanye n'ubwoko bw'umubiri bw'umunyamideli cyangwa uw'umunyamideli" byatangiriye gukwirakwira ku rubuga rwa interineti mu ntangiriro za Mata 2026.Ibyo birego byatangiriye gukwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga nka Facebook (yaritswe) na Threads (yaritswe), bamwe mu bakoresha bavuga ko itegeko nk'iryo

claim: Mu Kuboza 2025, Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Donald Trump, yatangaje ko hari igikorwa cyo gukora ubushakashatsi ku bwonko bwe, "nta cyo cyabonetse".
evidence: Mu Ukuboza 2025, ikiganiro cy'uko Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump yatangaje ko hari igisubizo cya MRI cy'ubwonko bwe "nta cyo cyabonetse" cyakwirakwijwe ku rubuga (archive): WASHINGTONYirata ku buzima bwe bwo mu mutwe, ku wa Mbere Donald J. Trump yavuze ko igisubizo cya MRI cyakozwe ku bwonko bwe nta cyo cyabonetse. "Nari mfite igisubizo cya MRI gitunganye", yabwiye abanyamakuru. "Abavuzi bakomeye mu gihugu barebye ubwonko bwanjye maze baraza". Trump yavuze ko nta mpamvu yo gushyiraho igisubizo cya MRI ye kuko "nta cyo wabona", yongeraho ati "ni nk'igice cya Sean East Wing".Iyi nyandiko ya Trump yabonetse mu gihe yashakaga kumenya uko MRI yabaga iturutse mu kwezi k'Ukwakira 2025.

claim: Amerika yari ifite umusaruro w'ibiceri by'ubukizi mu mwaka wa 2020 iyo yari iyobowe na Perezida Trump, ariko uwo musaruro waje guhinduka ikigega cy'ubucuruzi cya miliyoni 40.6 z'amadolari igihe Perezida Biden yari ku butegetsi.
evidence: Ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Donald Trump bwashyize imbere icyifuzo cya Perezida Trump cyo gukunda ice-cream, Joe Biden, avuga ko yayoboye ubucuruzi bwa ice-cream muri Amerika mu nzira y'ubukungu igoranye. "Amerika yari ifite umusaruro w'ubucuruzi w'icyi cyeri mu mwaka wa 2020 igihe Perezida Trump yari ayoboye, ariko uwo musaruro wahindutse ikigega cy'ubucuruzi cya miliyoni 40.6 z'amadolari mu gihe Perezida Biden yari ayoboye", ibiro bya U.S. Trade Representative byanditse ku itariki ya 20 Nyakanga ku itariki ya X. Iyo nyandiko irimo imbonera igaragaza ikigega cy'ubucuruzi bwa ice-cream muri Amerika n'u Buyapani, Afurika y'Epfo, Umuryango w'Ubumwe bw'u Burayi, Brezili, Turukiya.

claim: Vance Boelter, ukurikiranyweho kwica abadepite babiri b'Abademokarasi ba Minnesota n'abo bashakanye muri Kamena 2025 (umwe muri bo yarapfuye), yigeze gutorerwa kuba umwe mu bagize inama y'inama y'abajyanama n'umukuru w'Abademokarasi ba Minnesota, Tim Walz.
evidence: Kubera ko Boelter yabanje gutorerwa muri iyo nama mu 2016 na Mark Dayton wahoze ari guverineri w'Abademokarate, Walz yamusimbuye mu 2019 mu gihe cy' manda ya kabiri, irangira muri Mutarama 2023. Bivugwa ko Boelter ubwe atari Umudemokarate, kandi ibiro bya Walz byemeje ko guverineri atahura n'abashaka gutorwa mbere yo kubatora.Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu hagati mu mwaka wa 2025, ikiganiro cyatangiye gukwirakwira ko Vance Boelter, uwategwaga kwica abashyitsi babiri b'Abademokarate n'abashyingiranywe babo ku itariki ya 14 Kamena, yigeze gutorerwa kuba umwe mu bagize Guverineri w'Abademokarate, Tim Walz. Umwe mu bashyingiranywe yapfuye.

claim: Umunyamabanga ushinzwe itangazamakuru mu Nzu y'Abanyamerika Karoline Leavitt, yatangaje "ukuri" ku birebana n'imyanya ndangagitsina y'umukinnyi wa WNBA witwa Brittney Griner, naho WNBA itangaza ko hari "imyanzuro y'ibitsina" itegetswe.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo Ikiganiro cyakwirakwijwe ku rubuga rwa interineti muri Kanama 2025 cyavuze ko umunyamabanga w'ibiro by'ibanze bya White House, Karoline Leavitt, yahishuye "ukuri" ku birebana n'ibitsina by'umukinnyi wa WNBA, Brittney Griner, ukinira Atlanta Dream.Abakoresha babisobanuraga bavuga ko WNBA yatangaje ko "ibipimo by'ibitsina" byemewe ku mwaka w'imikino utaha wa Basketball.

claim: Ubutegetsi bwa Trump ntibwamaze gutesha agaciro gusa Ikigo cy'Igihugu gishinzwe Ihindagurika ry'Ikirere, ahubwo nanone bwamaze gutesha agaciro ibyo bita NOAA.
evidence: Imyuzure yo muri leta ya Texas yahitanye abantu barenga 100 barimo abakobwa mu nkambi y'impeshyi yatumye abantu bongera kwibuka ko hakurwaho imirimo mu biro by'ishami birimo na National Weather Service. Ku itariki ya 6 Nyakanga TikTok yatangaje ko Perezida Donald Trump yahagaritse amafaranga y'ikigo cy'igihugu gishinzwe ibijyanye n'ikirere n'ibihe. TikTok yahagaritswe tumaze gutangiza igenzura ryacu ry'ibanze, ariko twabonye ko videwo na yo yagabanyijwe kuri X , kandi ko n'ibindi biganiro by'uko NOAA na service y'ikirere byahagaritswe byashyizwe ku rubuga rwa interineti.

claim: Igitero cya Amerika ku kigo cya kirimbuzi cya Fordow muri Irani
evidence: Mu gihe cy'intambara ya Iran na Isirayeli, videwo ivuga ko igaragaza igitero cya Amerika ku kigo cya kirimbuzi cya Fordow muri Irani, iri gukwirakwira cyane ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Iyo videwo igaragaza isasu rikomeye, ivuga ko igisirikare cya Amerika cy'indege cyagabye igitero ku bigo bitatu bya kirimbuzi muri Irani mu cyumweru gishize  Fordow, Natanz na Isfahan. Umukoresha wa Facebook yashyize hanze iyo videwo ya Viral yanditseho amagambo akurikira: "Ijoro ryakeye, nyuma y'igitero cya Amerika, icyicaro cya Irani gikomeye cya kirimbuzi cya Fordow..!! " (Icyongereza: " Ijoro ryakeye, nyuma y'igitero cya Amerika, icyicaro cya Irani gikomeye cya kirimbuzi cya Fordow, Fordow..!!) Ushobora kureba iyi nkuru hano.

claim: Mu kwezi kwa Kamena 2025, Dmitry Medvedev wahoze ari Perezida w'u Burusiya, yavuze ko "ibihugu byinshi biteguye guha Irani ibisasu byabyo bya kirimbuzi".
evidence: Ku itariki ya 22 Kamena 2025, Amerika yagabye igitero ku bigo bitatu bya kirimbuzi muri Irani. Kuri uwo munsi, impande nyinshi ku mbuga nkoranyambaga  harimo na Reddit (yararekuwe) na X (yararekuwe)  zanditseho amagambo yavuzwe n'uwahoze ari Perezida w'u Burusiya Dmitry Medvedev, aho yagize ati "ibihugu byinshi biteguye guha Irani imitwe y'intambara ya kirimbuzi ubwabyo".Ibitabo byinshi (yarekuwe, yarekuwe, yarekuwe) byatumiwe n'abantu babarirwa muri za miriyoni.Ibitabo byinshi byatangajwe n'abakoreshaga Bibiliya bigaragaza ko bamwe bemeraga ko ibyo bavugaga ari ibinyoma cyangwa ko ibyo bavugaga bitari biboneka mu nyandiko ya mbere ya Medvedev.Nubwo abo bakoreshaga Bibiliya bari bafite impungenge, Medvedev, wari Visi Perezida w'Inama Nkuru y'Umutekano w'u Burusiya, yavuze mu ruhame (yarekuwe) ko "ibihugu byinshi biteguye guha Irani ibitwaro bya kirimbuzi ubwabyo ubwabyo".

claim: Ibiganiro byerekanaga mu buryo bw'ukuri ibaruwa Umushikirizamanza Mukuru wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Pam Bondi yoherereje umuyobozi wa FBI Kash Patel ku birebana n'ibikoresho bya Epstein mu kwezi k'Ugushyingo 2025.

claim: Elon Musk yashyize ubutumwa kuri X bugira buti "Nta bwo nari kuba ndiho, Trump yari gutsindwa mu matora, Abademokrate bari kuyobora Inzu y'Abadepite, naho Abarepubulika bakaba 51-49 muri Sena".
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo mu gihe habayeho umwuka mubi ukomeje kwiyongera hagati ya Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump n'umuherwe mu by'ikoranabuhanga Elon Musk, wahoze ari umukozi wa leta yihariye, yanditse kuri X ku itariki ya 5 Kamena 2025, avuga ko agaragaza ishusho y'icyuma cyafashwe na konti ya Musk yemejwe ko ari yo yatumye Trump yongera gutorwa mu mwaka wa 2024. "Iyo ntaba ndiho, Trump yari gutsindwa amatora, Abademokrate bari kuyobora Inteko Ishinga Amategeko, naho Abare ya Repubulika bakaba ari 51-49 muri Sena", Musk yavuze mu nyandiko ye.

claim: Umuyobozi mukuru w'ingabo z'u Buhinde, Jenerali Upendra Dwivedi, yemeye ko mu ntambara ya vuba aha yabereye muri Pakisitani, hari izindi ndege esheshatu zatakaje, kandi ko abasirikare 250 bishwe.
evidence: Videwo ivuga ko yerekana Umuyobozi Mukuru w'Ingabo z'Abasirikare (COAS), Jenerali Upendra Dwivedi, yemeza ko indege esheshatu z'Abahinde zatakaje, n'abasirikare 250 bagizwe abagabo b'intwari mu gitero cya gisirikare cyabaye muri Gicurasi 2025 na Pakistan, yagiye ikwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. claim: Umucamanza w'Umunyeshyamba witwa Charlie Kirk yigeze kuvuga ko aramutse afite umukobwa w'imyaka 10 wafashe inda nyuma yo gufatwa ku ngufu, yari kumwifuza ko yabyara.
evidence: Nyuma y'aho umuhanga mu by'imico y'abagore witwa Charlie Kirk yarashwe ku itariki ya 10 Nzeri 2025, ubwo yari mu birori byabereye muri kaminuza ya Utah Valley, abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga basangiye imyirondoro myinshi irimo amagambo Kirk yavuze. Imwe muri iyo mitwe, yasohotse ku mbuga nyinshi, ni uko Kirk yigeze kuvuga ko aramutse afite umukobwa w'imyaka 10 watwite nyuma yo gufatwa ku ngufu, yari kumwifuriza kubyara. Abasomyi ba Snopes bashakishije urubuga bashakisha ibindi bisobanuro ku bivugwa muri ayo magambo.Iyi nyandiko yasohotse na Feminist News (@feminist_news_now) twabonye ko ari iy'ukuri.Iyi nyandiko yavuye mu mashusho yo kuri YouTube yo mu mwaka wa 2024 yasohotse na Jubilee yitwa "Can 25e Students Omart 1 bit Conservative?"

claim: Fact Check: OMS ntabwo yemeje umuti wo mu rugo wa COVID-19, ntukagire icyo ukora ngo ushakishe amakuru atari yo.
evidence: Nubwo twakwifuza kwemera ko ibintu nk'ibyo ari ukuri, kugeza ubu nta muti cyangwa uburyo bwo kuvura, cyane cyane imiti yo mu rugo, byabonetse ko ari ingirakamaro mu kurwanya virusi. Ntiyigeze yemezwa na OMS cyangwa ikindi kigo cy'ubuzima nk'icyo. Iyo nyandiko ivuga ko hari umutobe w'ibikomoka ku gikoni byoroheje nka kurumeka, inkeri n'ubuki, iyo byamaze iminsi itanu bishobora guhitana ikwirakwira ry'umugera.

claim: Leta y'u Buhinde irimo guha amafaranga imiryango yabuze ababo ya COVID-19 - Amafaranga y'ubwishingizi ku bapfuye bahuye na Covid-19 ashobora kuboneka mu buryo bw'ubudehe bwa PMJJBY na PMSBY.
evidence: Ubutumwa bwagiye busarangwa ku mbuga nkoranyambaga buvuga ko inyungu zihabwa na gahunda ya Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) na gahunda ya Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) zishobora kwishyurwa ku bapfuye bahitanwa na COVID-19.Icyemezo: Inyungu zihabwa na gahunda ya PMJJBY na PMSBY zishobora kwishyurwa ku bapfuye bahitanwa na COVID-19.Iby'ukuri: Nubwo ari ukuri ko gahunda ya PMJJBY ishobora kwishyurwa ku bapfuye bahitanwa na COVID-19, hari ibintu bimwe na bimwe biteganywa ku birebana n'ububasha bwo kwishyurwa no kwishyurwa.

evidence: Mu gihe Apple izakura amashanyarazi n'amajwi mu gikoresho cyayo, igatangaza ko izagabanya imirasire ya karuboni igera kuri toni miriyoni 2 buri mwaka, ibyo bikaba bingana no gukura imodoka zigera ku bihumbi 450.000 mu mihanda buri mwaka. Apple kandi iri gukura adapteri y'amashanyarazi na EarPods mu myenda ya iPhone, ikongera kugabanya imirasire ya karuboni kandi ikirinda gucukura no gukoresha ibikoresho by'agaciro, ibyo bikaba bituma imishwaro mito kandi yoroshye, kandi bigatuma ibitabo 70 ku ijana by'amashanyarazi byongera guturwa ku ikaramu.

claim: Icyaha gikomeye kandi kitababarirwa cyakozwe n'ikinyamakuru cy'Abafaransa Charlie Hebdo cyo gusebya mu maso heza y'Umuhanuzi, cyongeye kugaragaza urwango n'urwango by'inzego za politiki n'umuco z'ibihugu by'iburengerazuba by'isi, bigirira idini rya Isilamu n'abayisilamu.
evidence: Icyo kinyamakuru cyatunguwe cyane n'abantu benshi b'abayisilamu, ariko cyashyizweho n'amashyaka menshi y'abayisilamu.Icyo gihe Perezida Jacques Chirac w'u Bufaransa yashyize ahagaragara itangazo rigira riti: "Ikintu cyose gishobora kugirira nabi imyizerere y'undi muntu, cyane cyane imyizerere y'idini, kigomba kwirindwa.Umudendezo wo kuvuga amagambo yagombye gukoreshwa mu buryo bw'ibanga".Igitabo cya Charlie Hebdo cyasubije cyasohoye ibaruwa, yashyizweho umukono n'abanditsi n'abanyabwenge 12 barimo Salman Rushdie na Ayaan Hirsi Ali, aho hari amagambo agira ati:"Twe, abanditsi, abanyamakuru, abanyabwenge, dusaba kurwanya ubutegetsi bw'igitugu bw'idini no guteza imbere umudendezo, amahirwe angana n'indangagaciro ku bantu bose. Mu mwaka wakurikiyeho, Charlie Hebdo yashyikirijwe n'amashyirahamwe abiri y'abayisilamu yo mu Bufaransa, ari yo Mosque y'i Paris n'Ubumwe bw'Abigenga idini rya Isilamu mu

claim: Umutobe wa Beetroot amla ushobora gukiza kanseri yo mu cyiciro cya 4 mu minsi 40
evidence: Ese kunywa umutobe, amla na juzi ya karoti bishobora kuvura kanseri yo mu cyiciro cya 4? Oya. Nta gihamya ishingiye ku bushakashatsi igaragaza ko umutobe, amla na juzi ya karoti bishobora kuvura kanseri yo mu cyiciro cya 4. Mu gihe iyo juzi itanga ingufu n'imyuka igwanya kanseri, ubushakashatsi bushyigikira ingaruka zayo zo kurwanya kanseri bugarukira gusa ku bushakashatsi bw'ibikorerwa mu byumba cyangwa ku nyamaswa. Ntibigaragazwa ko ari uburyo bwo kuvura kanseri. Impuguke zivuga ko hakoreshwa uburyo bwo kuvura indwara yemewe n'abaganga gusa no kujya kwa muganga mbere yo kugerageza ubundi buryo ubwo ari bwo bwose. Iheruka gusohoka ku itariki ya 3 Nyakanga 2025 na Dr Priyamvada Quick Take. Ikiganiro cyo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga kivuga ko umutobe, amla na juzi ya karoti bishobora kuvura kanseri yo mu cyiciro cya 4 mu minsi 40 gusa. Nyuma yo gusuzuma uko ibintu bimeze, twabonye ko ibyo bavuga ari ibinyoma. Ikiganiro cya Instagram cya Anetro cyavuze ko umutobe ashobora kuvura kanseri mu gihe cy'

claim: Hari amashusho atatu agaragaza ko Irani yibasiye icyicaro gikuru cya Mossad muri Tel Aviv, ikigo cy'ubutasi cya Isirayeli.
evidence: Mu gihe itangazamakuru rya leta ya Irani rivuga ko ibisasu byabo byageze ku cyicaro gikuru cya Mossad muri Tel Aviv, amashusho menshi ari kugenda asakara avuga ko agaragaza ibitero n'inyubako yangiritse, nubwo Israel bivugwa ko yabyibeshye igaragaza ko hari ibyangiritse ku kibuga cy'imodoka cyari hafi aho.Mu gihe kimwe mu mashusho ya virusi ivuga ko agaragaza umukozi wa Mossad wafashwe, bivugwa ko yari afunze ku gisasu maze akajyanwa ku cyicaro gikuru cya Mossad nyuma yo gufatwa muri Irani, amashusho make n'amafoto agaragaza ko igisasu cy'ubushyi cya Irani cyasenye icyicaro gikuru na yo yagiye akwirakwira hose.Ibice by'amafoto byashyizwe ahagaragara bishobora kubonwa hano na hano.Umushinzi wa Reba amakuru yabonye ko amagambo y'ibimenyetso by'ibimenyetso by'ibimenyetso by'ibimenyetso by'ibimenyetso by'ibimenyetso by'ibimenyetso bya "Mossad" yahawe mu nzu ya Classified, aho yabonye ko ari ho yabonye amashusho yose ya Classified, maze agaragaza ko ari

claim: Umuvuzi w'abana wo muri Houston yirukanye Dr. Christina Propst nyuma yo gushyira ku rubuga rwa internet ko abahuye n'umwuzure wo muri Texas muri Nyakanga 2025 bari abayoboke ba Perezida Donald Trump, kandi ko bahawe ibyo batanze.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo Umuvugizi w'Inama y'Ubuvuzi ya Texas yemeje ko ku itariki ya 6 Nyakanga 2025, itangazo ry'umuganga wagize "ibitekerezo bya politiki by'impaka" mu mpera z'icyumweru cya kane cy'ukwezi kwa Nyakanga ku byerekeye imyuzure yishe muri Texas, ryerekezaga kuri Dr. Christina Propst, umuganga muri Blue Fish Pediatrics. Blue Fish Pediatrics yavuze mu itangazo ryo ku itariki ya 5 n'iya 6 Nyakanga 2025, ko umuganga wagize ibitekerezo ku byerekeye imyuzure yo muri Texas yateje "ibikomere bikomeye n'umujinya" atakiri mu kigo. Ayo magambo ntiyavugaga ko uwo muganga yirukanywe. Muri Nyakanga 2025, nyuma y'imyuzure yatumye abantu 100 bapfa cyangwa bakabura muri Texas, hakwirakwijwe ku rubuga rwa interineti ikirego (cyashyizwe mu bushyinguro) cy'uko umuganga mu by'ubuvuzi bw'abana muri Houston yirukanywe umuganga witwa Christina Trump, nyuma y'uko yashyize kuri interineti ko abaganga ba Texas Proporoteri bash

claim: Ushobora kohereza ubutumwa kuri RBG kuri 50409 kugira ngo ushyire umukono ku nyandiko igusaba umusenateri wawe kudasimbura Ruth Bader Ginsberg mu rukiko rw'ikirenga kugeza nyuma y'amatora yo mu mwaka wa 2020
evidence: Kohereza ijambo resist kuri Resistbot kuri Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram cyangwa se ukoresheje ubutumwa bugufi kuri 50409 maze usubize ibibazo byanyuze kuri telefoni. Mu minota mike, uzaba uhuye na Kongere cyangwa abandi bayobozi bawe batowe. Fungura ibaruwa yawe kugira ngo igire ingaruka nziza. Ubutumwa n'ibipimo by'amakuru bishobora gukurikizwa niba ukoresha ubutumwa bugufi. Ubutumwa buzajya bujya bubaho mu buryo butandukanye. Ubutumwa buzajya buhagarara kuri 50409 kugira ngo buhagarike ubutumwa bwose. Ubufasha bw'ibisobanuro buhagarike kuri 50409 kugira ngo buzafashwe. Reba imyanzuro y'imikoreshereze, itangazo ry'ibanga ry'ibanze n'umwunganire w'umukoresha.

claim: Muri Nzeri 2025, imbuga nkoranyambaga zaherekejwe ku mbuga nkoranyambaga zaberetse mu buryo bwemewe n'amategeko inyandiko yatanzwe n'umunyamategeko Alan Dershowitz yerekeza ku makuru ya Vanity Fair mu gitabo cya Jeffrey Epstein cyo ku isabukuru y'imyaka 50.
evidence: Muri Nzeri 2025, abantu bo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga batangiye gusangiza umunyamategeko Alan Dershowitz inkuru y'amavuko yari mu nyandiko y'amabaruwa y'umunyamategeko wari ufite ikibazo cy'amafaranga, Jeffrey Epstein ku isabukuru y'imyaka 50 y'amavuko we mu 2003. Epstein, bivugwa ko yari afitanye isano n'abantu benshi bakomeye, yishwe n'ubwiyahure muri gereza mu mwaka wa 2019 ubwo yari ategereje urubanza rwo gucuruza abantu mu by'ibitsina. Ku itariki ya 8 Nzeri, Komite y'Ubushinjacyaha y'Igihugu cya Amerika (U.S. House Oversight Committee) yashubijeho album y'amabaruwa y'amavuko nyuma yo guhamagaza umunyamategeko Alan Dershowitz ku nyandiko zitandukanye zivuga ku munyurabyaha w'ibitsina.

claim: Indege ya Air India AI 315 yafashwe n'umuriro igihe yahagurukaga i Delhi, abagenzi barinze
evidence: Vishvas News mu iperereza ryayo, yabonye ko iyo foto yafashwe n'abantu benshi atari iya vuba aha, ahubwo ko ari iy'ikintu cyabaye mbere. Iyo foto igaragaza umuriro watangiriye mu moteri y'indege ya Air India Express yari igiye i Kochi ku kibuga cy'indege cya Muscat. Ariko ubu, ubu igaragara mu buryo butari bwo nk'inkuru y'umuriro uherutse gutangirira mu ndege ya Air India igeze ku kibuga cy'indege cya Delhi.

claim: Mu ibaruwa yashyize kuri interineti na mugenzi we Ghislaine Maxwell yashyizwe ahagaragara na Komite y'Inteko Ishinga Amategeko mu Ugushyingo 2025, umunyabyaha mu by'ibitsina Jeffrey Epstein yise Perezida wa Amerika Donald Trump "imbwa itarabyina" kandi avuga ko Trump yamaze amasaha menshi ari kumwe n'uwo yakoreye ihohoterwa rishingiye ku gitsina mu rugo rwa Epstein.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyo mibare, amakuru y'ibinyoma yamamaye ku mbuga nkoranyambaga mu kwezi k'Ugushyingo 2025 avuga ko ubutumwa bwagiye buhererekanywa hagati y'umunyabyaha wafashwe ku ngufu witwa Jeffrey Epstein n'umufatanyabikorwa we witwa Ghislaine Maxwell, bwagaragaje ko Epstein yavuze ko Perezida wa Amerika Donald Trump ari "imbwa itigeze ibika" kandi ko uwo muyobozi "yamaranye amasaha menshi" n'uwo bashakanye na Epstein.

claim: Ibikoresho by'ubucuruzi byagabanutse cyane.Ingufu zaragabanutse cyane. ... Hariho amafaranga 4 na 5 ku litiro rimwe ry'ibikomoka kuri peteroli.
evidence: Kimwe mu bintu by'ingenzi byavuzwe mu matora ya Perezida Donald Trump mu mwaka wa 2024 ni ugusubiza inyuma ibiciro by'ibiciro byagabanutse mu mwaka wa 2022 ubwo yari ayobowe na Joe Biden. Trump yasezeranyije ko azagabanya ibiciro by'ibikomoka ku bintu by'ibanze, imodoka n'ibindi bikoresho by'abakiliya. Trump yagize igitego cy'amafaranga ku biciro mu nama yahuje inama ya Guverinoma yabaye ku wa 26 Kanama, ashyira ahagaragara ibyiciro bike.

claim: Dissanayake yahagaritse ikigo cy'ubuvuzi bw'ibiza muri Sri Lanka
evidence: Abayobozi banze ibinyoma bavuga ko Sri Lanka yari 'yahagaritse' ikigo cyita ku byago by'impanuka. claim: Mike Johnson, Umuvugizi w'Ibiro by'Abadepite bya Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, R-La, yagize ati "Abademokarate basabwa gufungura guverinoma. Bakomeza kuvuga ko Abarepubulika ari bo bayobora guverinoma.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo, Johnson yabitangaje mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru cyo ku itariki ya 27 Ukwakira 2025, ubwo ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda bwari bwaramaze gufunga ubutegetsi bwa mbere, ubwo bwari bumaze kugera ku munsi wa 27.Yashakaga kuvuga ko Sena yari ifite amajwi 60 yari ikeneye kugira ngo ishyingure amategeko menshi.Mu gihe ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda bwari bwongeye gufunga ubutegetsi bwabwo mu cyumweru cya kane mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa cumi 2025, abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bashyize hanze videwo yagaragazaga Mike Johnson, Umuyobozi w'Inzu y'Abanyamerika muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, avuga ko Abarepubulika "bategetse ubutegetsi".Kuba ngo ibyo byarangiriye, Sena yagombaga kwemera itegeko ryabanje gufunga ubutegetsi, rigatuma bwongera gufungura ubutegetsi.Mu kiganiro cyagiye cyakwirakwira kuri interineti, Johnson yumvise amagambo agira ati "Abarepubulika bagomba gufungura ubutegetsi.Bategeka ko Abarepubulika bayobora ubutegetsi.Ntitwe tubikoraho".Ibimwe mu nyandiko (bishyizwe aha ngaha n'ibishusobanuro)

evidence: Kohereza ijambo resist kuri Resistbot kuri Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, cyangwa se ukoresheje ubutumwa bugufi kuri 50409 maze usubize ibibazo byanyuzwe.Mu minota mike, uzaba uhuye na Kongere cyangwa abandi bayobozi bawe batowe.Gira ibaruwa yawe uyikingure kugira ngo igire ingaruka nziza cyane. ... claim: Nancy Pelosi yavuze ko u Bushinwa bwari kwifuza Joe Biden.
evidence: Ubushinwa buvuga ko Perezida Donald Trump ari "utazwi" kandi ko bushima ko atazasubira gutorwa, nk'uko bivugwa mu bushakashatsi bushya bwakozwe n'ubutasi bwa Amerika.Igisobanuro cyasohowe ku wa Gatanu n'umuyobozi w'Ikigo cy'Igihugu gishinzwe kurwanya ubutasi n'umutekano, cyemeje ko Irani irimo gukora ibishoboka byose kugira ngo ihangane na Trump mbere y'amatora yo mu mwaka wa 2020.

claim: Hafi 40% by'abakozi bose bakora mu mirima muri Amerika ni abimukira badafite ibyangombwa.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo Nk'uko imibare ya vuba aha ya USDA ibivuga, abagera kuri 40% by'abakozi bakora mu mirima y'ibikomoka ku mirima  abakora mu mirima y'ibiti, imboga n'ibigori, urugero nk'abakora mu mirima, ntibari bafite uburenganzira bwemewe n'amategeko bwo gukorera muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika hagati ya 2020 na 2022.Ibipimo bya 40% by'imyaka ya 2020-2022 ntibyabaga bikubiyemo abakozi bakora mu mirima y'ibikomoka ku mirimo y'ubworozi mu gihe cy'imimerere runaka yemewe n'amategeko  cyangwa abakozi bakora mu mirima y'ibikomoka ku mirima y'ibikomoka ku mafi.Ibipimo by'umwaka wa 2023 n'ibya nyuma ntibyariho mu gihe cy'iki gitabo.Mu ntangiriro za 2025, abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga batangiye gusangira ko abagera kuri 40% by'abakozi bose bakora mu mirima y'ibikomoka ku mirima y'ibikomoka ku giti cyabo bari abimukira badafite ibyangombwa.Ibitabo byo kuri X, Reddit

claim: Hari amakuru avuga ko Ajit Doval yasabye Abanyarwanda gukuraho Amazon kugira ngo bashyireho igitutu Amerika mu ntambara y'amahoro.
evidence: Igishushanyo kigaragaza itangazo ry'umunyamakuru wa Amerika, Ajit Doval, ufasha mu by'umutekano, yasabye Abanyarwanda gukuraho porogaramu ya Amazon kugira ngo bashyireho igitutu ku mitungo y'Amerika mu ntambara y'amahoro iriho ubu, cyatangiye gukwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Iki gitekerezo cyumvikanisha ko guhagarika ibikorwa by'urubuga mu buryo bw'igitero byari kugira ingaruka zikomeye ku nyungu za Amerika. Reka turebe niba koko Ajit Doval ari we wavuze icyo gitekerezo. Iyi nyandiko iri hejuru irashobora kuboneka hano. (Archive) NM VERIFIED NewsMobile yemeje icyo gitekerezo, maze igasanga ko igishushanyo cy'urubuga cya Viral cyari icyerekana ko ari ikinyoma. Itsinda rya NM ryatangiye igenzura ryayo rishakisha itangazo ry'urubuga rya Ajit Doval rivuga ko ari ryo rya mbere rya Amazon n'intambara y'amahoro.

claim: Mu Kuboza 2025, abakozi ba Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika bashinzwe kurinda ubwimukira n'amahoro i Minneapolis, bafatiye umuturage w'Umunyamerika w'imyaka 55 witwaga Sue Tincher, wari urimo areba uko bakoraga imirimo yabo.
evidence: Ku wa 9 Ukuboza 2025, mu gitondo, abakozi ba Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika bashinzwe ubwimukira n'amahoro bakoze igikorwa cyo kwimukira mu mahanga hafi y'umugi wa North 21 na North Oliver Avenue muri Minneapolis.Nk'uko bigaragara mu nyandiko zavuzwe cyane ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, abakozi bafatiye Sue Tincher w'imyaka 55, umuturage w'Amerika wari ukurikiranye ibyo bikorwa.Mu gihe bari mu nzu y'imbohe, nk'uko bigaragara mu nyandiko, abakozi bateje ubwoba Snopes-Spray Tincher bamwicaza impeta ye.Abasomyi ba Snopes bashatse ku rubuga rwabo maze batwandikira ubutumwa kuri interineti, kugira ngo barebe niba ibyo banditse ari ukuri.Tubonye ko ari ukuri, nubwo Tincher yashoboye gusuzuma uko byagenze, abasomyi batandukanye batanze ku giti cyabo batemeza ko bari baciye impeta ya Tincher igihe yari mu nzu y'imbohe.Nyamara, hari abantu benshi baganiriye na Snopes batangaje ko Snopes yashyingurwaga, batumaho itangazo ryo gusaba ko Minisiteri y'Umutekano w'I

claim: Umukinnyi wa filime witwa Christian Bale arimo yubaka amazu 12 mu mudugudu w'amadolari miriyoni 22 uri i Palmdale muri leta ya Kaliforuniya, agamije gutuma abavandimwe na bashiki bacu bakomeza kuba hamwe.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo Muri Kamena 2025, hari ikirego (cyashyizwe ahagaragara) cyakwirakwijwe ku mbuga nkoranyambaga ko umukinnyi wa Batman Christian Bale yubatse amazu 12 mu mudugudu w'amadolari 22 miliyoni uri i Palmdale, muri leta ya Kaliforuniya, agamije kubumbatira abavandimwe na bashiki bacu mu bigo by'abashakanye.Ikindi cyemezo kizwi cyane kuri Facebook cyagiraga kiti "Christian Bale yubatse amazu 12 yo kubumbatira abavandimwe muri gahunda yo kubungabunga abana mu buryo bw'ibanze, agamije kubumbatira hamwe no kubumbatira hamwe".Icyo kirego cyakwirakwijwe kuri X (cyashyizwe ahagaragara), Instagram (cyashyizwe ahagaragara) na Bluesky (cyashyizwe ahagaragara), aho ibitabo byanditswe byanditseho byanditseho ko byari bikubiyemo igiciro cya miliyoni 22 z'amadolari y'amafaranga y'amafaranga y'amafaranga y'amafaranga y'amarundi 22 y'amadolari yo kubaka.Abasomyi ba Snopes na bo bashakishije urubuga rwacu

claim: Minisitiri w'Ububanyi n'Amahanga wa Afghanistan Amir Khan Muttaqi yatangaje ko afite gahunda yo kubaka insengero z'Abahindu i Kabul n'i Kandahar, afashijwe n'amafaranga y'u Buhinde.
evidence: Minisitiri w'Ububanyi n'Amahanga wa Amir Khan Muttaqi aherutse gusura Ubuhinde, ahura na Minisitiri w'Ububanyi n'Amahanga w'u Buhinde, S Jaishankar, nyuma yaho videwo y'ikiganiro cye n'abanyamakuru igenda yiyongera ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Muri iyo videwo, Muttaqi yumvikanishijwe avuga mu gihindi ati "Nabwiye Minisitiri w'Intebe w'u Buhinde Narendra Modi ko nimumfasha udufasha amafaranga make, tuzabaka insengero za Lord Shiva na Vishnu i Kabul na Kandahar. Nyuma yaho, abagaragu b'Imana bo mu Buhinde bazajya bakora ingendo zo kujya muri Afghanistan. Twahagurukije hano insanganyamatsiko 'Jai Shri Ram'.Turashimira Modiji kuba adushyigikiye". Iyo videwo yo kuri Facebook, umukozi yaranditse ati "Ikintu kirimo gusenyuka: Minisitiri w'Amahanga wa Afghanistan Mutaqqi atangaza ko ubu Afghanistan yiteguye gufungura insengero zo gusenga Imana muri Afghanistan mu rwego rw'amafaranga".Ibiro ry'ib

claim: Donald Trump yagize ati "mu kwezi gushize, nagiye mu kigo cy'ubuvuzi, mbese utekereza ko byoroshye? nasinye ku mabwiriza yari kugabanya cyane ibiciro by'imiti yanyu".
evidence: Perezida yashyize umukono ku mabwiriza ane yo gushyira ku giciro cy'imiti ategeka Umunyamabanga ushinzwe ubuzima n'imibereho myiza y'abantu (HHS) gufata ingamba zitandukanye kugira ngo abarwayi bo muri Amerika babone ibiciro bigabanutse by'imiti y'uburwayi, harimo insuline na epinefrine, kandi babone ko abanyamerika babona igiciro cy'imiti yabo kigabanutse cyane.

claim: Kenneth Petty, umugabo w'umuraperi Nicki Minaj, ni umunyabyaha w'ibitsina wemewe n'amategeko.
evidence: Ku iherezo ry'Ukuboza 2025, itsinda ry'abacamanza ridafite inyungu, Turning Point USA (TPUSA) ryabereye mu nama ngarukamwaka i Phoenix muri Arizona.Igihe cy'iryo koraniro, umuyobozi mukuru wa TPSUA Erika Kirk, umugore w'uwahoze ari umwe mu bashinze iryo shyirahamwe, Charlie Kirk, yazanye umushyitsi wihariye ku rubyiniro  umuraperi Nicki Minaj.Icyerekanwa cy'uko rapper Nicki Minaj yari yarakorewe cyabaye impaka zikomeye ku mbuga nkoranyambaga nka X, aho bamwe mu bafana bagaragaje ko batangajwe n'uko Minaj yasabye ko yaboneka mu birori bya politiki.Nyamara bamwe mu banengaga ibyo, ntibatangajwe.Batangaje ko umugabo wa Minaj yari umunyabyaha w'ibitsina wiyandikishije kandi ko akenshi bagereranya ibyo bakoze n'ibirego by'ibyaha by'ibitsina byamaze igihe kirekire byashyizweho kuri Perezida Donald Trump.Snopes yakoze iperereza ku bivugwa ko umugabo wa Minaj yari umwana.Nk'uko ikinyamakuru People cyabi

claim: Mu gihe cy'amasaha atatu, kuva ku itariki ya 11 Gicurasi kugeza ku ya 12 Gicurasi 2026, Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Donald Trump, yashyize ubutumwa kuri konti ye ya Truth Social inshuro 55.
evidence: Ku itariki ya 11 Gicurasi 2026, abantu benshi bashyize ku rubuga rwa interineti amakuru y'ibanze ku rubuga rwa Perezida Donald Trump rwa Truth Social, aho yavuze ko Trump ari we wari ufite amakuru menshi ku rubuga rwe.Mu gihe Trump azwiho gushyiraho amagambo ateye ubwoba kuri uru rubuga, abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga batangajwe n'uko ibyo yanditse byatangiraga saa kumi n'ine z'ijoro z'ijoro z'ejo ku isaha ya EDT, bikakomeza kugeza mu gitondo cyo ku ya 12 Gicurasi.Robert Reich,unenga Trump akaba n'uwahoze ari umunyamabanga ushinzwe imirimo ku butegetsi wa Perezida Bill Clinton, yashyize ku rubuga rwe urutonde rurerure rw'ibyavuzwe ko Trump yanditse kuri Truth Social mu masaha atatu gusa.Abasomyi ba Snopes na bo bagerageje kureba urubuga rwacu kugira ngo bamenye niba Trump yari yarashyize hanze ibyo bintu byinshi.Yongeyeho ati: ibyo yanditse birimo ibitekerezo bidafite ishingiro, ibitekerezo by'amayeri bidashyize mu gaciro ku birebana n'amatora ya 2020 n'ibyavuzwe ko abanzi be bari bamugambaniye.

claim: Mu mwaka wa 2025, Chobani yari ahanganye n'urubanza rw'abantu bose, avuga ko yoguri ye irimo ibirungo bya phthalates, ari byo bintu by'ubumara byagiye bifitanye isano n'ihungabana ry'ihindagurika ry'umubiri.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyo mibare, Chobani yavuze mu itangazo ko urukiko rwatangaje ko ruzavanaho urubanza rw'ibinyoma rw'urwo rubanza mu gihe cy'urubanza rwo muri Kanama. Urwo rubanza ntirwari ruboneka mu ruhame igihe rwasohokaga. Mu mpera z'ukwezi k'Ukwakira 2025, abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bavuze ko Chobani yari ahanganye n'urubanza rw'itsinda ry'abantu, bavuga ko hari ibyokurya "by'ikirere" yari yaratanze birimo imiti yitwa phthalates, yabaga ifitanye isano n'ihungabana ry'umubiri.

claim: Buri wese ashobora gukingira COVID-19.
evidence: Igihe umunyamabanga w'ubuzima wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. yahaga ubuhamya imbere y'Inama y'Urukiko rw'Igihugu Rushinzwe Ubukungu ku wa 4 Nzeri, abasenateri benshi bamunengaga kubera ko yari yarabujije abantu gukingira COVID-19 nyuma yo kumusezeranya mu kwezi k'Ugushyingo ko "atazagira undi akingira". "Ese igihe wavugaga ibyo wafashe ikimenyetso kinini kigaragaza ko ubeshya?" Senateri Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass, yabajije Kennedy. Ku wa 27 Kanama, Ikigo cy'Igihugu gishinzwe ibiribwa n'imiti cya US Food and Drug Administration cyahinduye amabwiriza agenga gukingira COVID-19, gifata abantu bose bari mu kigero cy'imyaka 65 n'abari mu kigero cy'imyaka 6 n'abari mu kigero cy'amezi 6 n'abari mu kigero cy'imyaka irenga, kandi bakaba bafite nibura kimwe mu ndwara ziterwa mbere y'uko bakira COVID-19.

claim: Ama mask yo mu maso atuma umuntu agira ikibazo cy'ubushyuhe.

claim: Jackie Mitchell, umukobwa w'imyaka 17, yatsinze ibyamamare bya baseball Babe Ruth na Lou Gehrig nyuma y'umukino wo mu 1931 hagati ya Chattanooga Lookouts na New York Yankees.
evidence: Urugero, hari inkuru ikunzwe cyane (yaranditswe) yavuze ko Jackie Mitchell wari ufite imyaka 17 yafashe umukino w'imyidagaduro wabereye mu nkino z'i Chattanooga Lookouts, maze agatsinda abakinnyi babiri bakomeye, ariko ko umuyobozi wa Mitchell yahagaritse amasezerano ye, avuga ko umukino w'umupira w'amaguru "urushya cyane" ku bagore nyuma y'aho Mitchell amaze gutsinda.

claim: Ibendera rya Pakistan ryazamutse mu gitaramo cya DMK.
evidence: Ifoto ya M K Stalin ikikijwe n'ibendera ry'iburyo, iri gusohoka ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, aho bivugwa ko ibendera ry'igihugu cya Pakistani ryazamutse mu gitaramo cya Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) mu gihe cy'amatora y'Inteko Ishinga Amategeko ya Tamil Nadu. Umunyamakuru wa Facebook yashyize hanze iyo nyandiko y'iburyo, aho yagize ati: "Ushobora kureba iyi nyandiko hano. NM VERIFIED NewsMobile yemeye ko iyo nyandiko y'iburyo ari iy'ikinyoma. Iyo dusuzumye neza iyo foto, twabonye ko ibendera ry'iburyo tubona muri iyi shusho atari irya Pakistani. Ahubwo, rigaragaza Ishyirahamwe ry'Abahamya ba Yehova ry'Abahamya b'Igihugu (IUML), rikoresha ibendera ry'iburyo rifite icyumweru kimwe n'inyenyeri. Mu gihe mu isura rimwe, ibendera rya IUML ritandukanye n'irya Pakistani mu buryo bw'ibimenyetso n'imiterere.

claim: The New York Mets yasimbuye ibendera rya Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika ibendera rya Pride mu gihe indirimbo yubahiriza igihugu yaririmbwaga mu mukino wa baseball ku itariki ya 13 Kamena 2025.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo Mu kwezi kwa Kamena 2025, videwo y'amasegonda atanu yakwirakwijwe ku rubuga rwa interineti igaragaza ibendera rya Pride ku mukino wabereye kuri sitade ya New York Mets' Citi Field.Abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bavuga ko iryo bendera ryahinduye ibendera rya Amerika mu gihe indirimbo yubahiriza igihugu yaririmbwaga.Nubwo abantu batatangaje umukino wabaye, ibihuha byarakwirakwijwe nyuma y'ijoro rya buri mwaka rya Pride Night ry'ikipe rya cyenda, rizihiza abafana ba LGBTQ+ n'irebana no kwitabira umukino wa baseball, ku itariki ya 13 Kamena, ryahuriranye n'umukino barwanye na Tampa Bay Rays.Umukoresha wa X wacap (waherekejwe) waherekeje kuri clip yanditse ati "BREAKING - The New York Mets bahisemo kwerekana ibendera rya Pride mu mwanya w'ibendera rya Amerika mu gihe cy'indirimbo yubahiriza igihugu".

claim: Umunyamabanga ushinzwe umutekano mu gihugu, Kristo Noem, yashimiye Perezida Donald Trump ku bw'igihe cy'inkubi y'umuyaga cya 2025 kitigeze kiba muri Amerika, agira ati "mwatumye inkubi y'umuyaga ireka kuba".
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo, Noem yagize ati "Mwami, mwabashije gutsinda iki cyorezo mutari mucyorezo. Kandi rero, FEMA, FEMA... mwe, ndetse n'abari mu cyorezo mwabitsinze, turabishima". Icyakora, guseka gusetsa no gukomeza amagambo Noem yavuze kuri FEMA byagaragaje ko icyumba cyakiriye amagambo ngo "mwabitsinze" ari nk'aho ari urwenya gusa. Ikiganiro cyakwirakwiriye ku rubuga rwa interineti mu ntangiriro z'ukwezi kwa 12 mu mwaka wa 2025 cyavugaga ko Umunyamabanga wa Amerika w'Umutekano w'Igihugu, Noem Kristo yashimiye Perezida Donald Trump kuba yaritandukanyije n'abari mu gihugu mu gihe cy'ibihe by'ibihe by'impanuka, nyuma y'uko Noem ashyiraho amagambo mu kiganiro na leta ya White House cyo ku itariki ya 2 Ukuboza.

claim: Mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa Mata 2026, Abademokrate bo mu Nteko Ishinga Amategeko ya Minnesota bemeje ku bwende bwabo ko batazongera gukura abapfuye ku rutonde rw'abatora muri leta.

claim: "Abanyafurika y'Epfo bagera kuri miriyoni 12,4 ni abashomeri. "  Mmusi Maimane
evidence: Twasuzumye ibintu bitanu Perezida yavuze ku bukungu, byose bikaba byari ukuri. Ramaphosa yari afite amafaranga menshi mu gihe byari byerekeranye n'iterambere ryiza ry'Umurimo w'Igihugu (PIB), igihugu gifite igipimo cy'amafaranga kiri hasi cyane mu myaka 20 n'ibipimo by'amafaranga n'inguzanyo bikagenda bigabanuka. Ibintu bitanu yavuze ku bukene byakozwe n'abanyamuryango bo mu nzego zose za politiki byari ukuri, cyangwa hafi ya byo. John Steenhuisen wo mu ishyirahamwe Demokarasi yari afite ukuri ko ubushomeri bwari ku rwego rwo hasi cyane mu myaka itanu, ariko bagenzi be bagaragaje ko ibyo byari bikomeje gutuma abaturage ba Afurika y'Epfo bagera kuri miliyoni 12.4 baba badafite akazi, harimo n'abirabura 35.8% bo muri Afurika y'Epfo. Abanyamuryango babiri bo mu ishyaka ry'Umuryango wa UMkhonto weSizwe bari bafite amakosa ku birebana n'uko abaturage ba Afurika y'Epfo bakura vuba kurusha ubukungu bwayo, kandi bagasambana umubare w'imiryango itagira ibyokurya, bituma umubare w'abanyamuryango bayo uba uw'imbaraga

claim: Ibikoresho byitwa Stanley tumblers birimo ibipimo by'ubururu bishobora guteza uburozi bw'ubururu mu gihe bikoreshwa bisanzwe.
evidence: Mu ntangiriro z'umwaka wa 2024, ibiganiro byo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga byibandaga ku kuba muri izo tumblers harimo ikirundo, hamwe n'ibyifuzo bitandukanye ku birebana n'ingaruka zishobora guterwa n'ubuzima. Ibi byatumye habaho impaka ku mugaragaro ku birebana n'umutekano n'ubushakashatsi bwakozwe ku birebana n'ibikoresho. Ukwizera kwacu kugaragaza ko nubwo Stanley tumblers irimo ikirundo gito mu myubakire yayo, ibigeragezo bidateguwe bigaragaza ko hari akaga gafite igihe gito mu gihe ikoreshwa mu buryo busanzwe. Abakoresha Facebook bavuga ko inkongoro za Stanley zishobora guteza akaga kubera ikirundo mu myubakire yazo, bagaragaza ko zishobora gutera ubumara bw'ikirundo.

claim: Sunil Gavaskar yavuze ko "Virat Kohli yiga gusa ku mupira wa Anushka [Sharma] mu gihe cy'igifungo"

Ibyo ntibizaba bihagije.' Gavaskar yerekezaga ku kiganiro cyo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga cyabayeho mu gihe cyo gufunga aho umuturanyi yari yarasohotseho Sharma arasa umuturanyi we ku ibaraza ry'inzu yabo.

claim: Mu ibaruwa yashyize kuri interineti na mugenzi we Ghislaine Maxwell yashyizwe ahagaragara na Komite y'Inteko Ishinga Amategeko mu Ugushyingo 2025, umunyabyaha mu by'ibitsina Jeffrey Epstein yise Perezida wa Amerika Donald Trump "imbwa itarabyina" kandi avuga ko Trump yamaze amasaha menshi ari wenyine n'uwo yakoreye ihohoterwa rishingiye ku gitsina mu rugo rwa Epstein.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyo mibare, amakuru y'ibinyoma yamamaye ku mbuga nkoranyambaga mu kwezi k'Ugushyingo 2025 avuga ko ubutumwa bwagiye buhererekanywa hagati y'umunyabyaha wafashwe ku ngufu witwa Jeffrey Epstein n'umufatanyabikorwa we witwa Ghislaine Maxwell, bwagaragaje ko Epstein yavuze ko Perezida wa Amerika Donald Trump ari "imbwa itigeze ibika" kandi ko uwo muyobozi "yamaranye amasaha menshi" n'uwo bashakanye na Epstein.

claim: Inama Mpuzamahanga y'umukino wa Cricket (ICC) yasohoye itangazo rivuga ko igihano cy'umwaka uhagije cyo guhagarika umukino wa Cricket muri Pakistan gihabwa n'ikigo cy'igihugu cy'imikino ya Cricket cyo muri Pakistan.
evidence: ICC yatangaje ko itazatangira umukino ukomeye uzaba ku itariki ya 15 Gashyantare, nubwo leta yari yavuyeho ku mugaragaro kugira ngo ikipe y'igihugu itekereze ku mukino usigaye uzaba utangiye ku itariki ya 7 Gashyantare. (Archive Link) "Ibyo yavuze" byagiye birushaho gusakara mbere y'igikombe cy'isi cya 2026 T20, aho Pakistan izajya itegura umukino wa A wahuje n'u Buhinde mu cyumweru gitaha i Colombo. Mbere yaho, Pakistan yari yatangaje ko itazatangira umukino ukomeye uzaba ku itariki ya 15 Gashyantare, nubwo leta yari yavuyeho kugira ngo ikipe y'igihugu itekereze ku mukino usigaye uzaba ku itariki ya 7 Gashyantare.

claim: Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump yise Russell Vought, umuyobozi w'Urwego Rushinzwe Ubuyobozi n'Ingengo y'imari, "Darth Vader" mu ijambo rye ryo mu kwezi k'Ukwakira 2025.

Ariko ariko aba ari guca ibintu imbere y'Abademokrate kandi nta na rimwe bazongera kubisubiramo". Mu kiganiro cyabaye mu kwezi k'Ukwakira 2025 mu Nzu y'Ibinyabuzima ya White House, Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump, uko bigaragara, yise Russell Vought, umuyobozi w'Ibiro by'Ubutegetsi n'Ingengo y'imari, "Darth Vader", izina ry'umuntu mubi wo mu myidagaduro ya "Star Wars".

claim: Mu ijambo yashyize ahagaragara ku itariki ya 6 Mutarama 2026 mu nama y'aba Repubulika bo mu Nteko Ishinga Amategeko, Perezida Donald Trump wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika yavuze ko Abademokarate bazatuma "abahindutse igitsina gore bose" mu gihe bazaba batsinze amatora yo mu mwaka wa 2026.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyo ngingo, Trump yavuze amagambo agira ati "abafite ibitsina bigana ku bandi bose" mu ijambo rye rivuga ibya demokarasi. Perezida yavuze ko Abademokarate bifuza "abafite ibitsina bigana ku bandi bose", ariko ko atigeze avuga ko bazatuma habaho politiki nk'iyo. Uko yavuze amagambo asa n'aho yumvikanisha ko ibyo byari kuba ari ihitamo aho kuba itegeko. Trump yagiye akoresha amagambo nk'ayo kenshi ashaka kwiyerekeza ku Bademokarate kandi agahakana politiki y'abafite uburenganzira ku bandi. Hari amwe mu magambo yari yavuze mbere y'aho, arimo amagambo ahuriye n'ibyo avuga ku birebana n'ikoreshwa ry'imbaraga mu gushyiraho "abafite ibitsina bigana ku bandi bose". Mu ntangiriro za Mutarama 2026, Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika Donald Trump yavuze ko Abademokarate bari guhata "abafite ibitsina bigana ku bandi bose" mu gihe bari kuba bageze mu matora y'igice cya kabiri, nk'uko bivugwa ku itangazamakuru ryo ku rubuga rwa interineti.

claim: Amategeko ya SAVE America asaba ko buri wese yongera kwiyandikisha kugira ngo atore mu maso kandi uruhushya rwo gutwara imodoka, ID y'ukuri cyangwa ID ya gisirikare ntabwo bihagije.
evidence: Mark Kelly wo muri leta ya Arizona, yavuze ko mu gihe itegeko rya SAVE America Act ryaba ryashyizweho, rizatuma buri wese uri ku rutonde rw'abatora ahura n'inzitizi zikomeye. "Itegeko rya SAVE America ntirita ku Amerika, Kelly yavuze mu nyandiko yo ku itariki ya 17 Werurwe. "Kandi nta kintu na kimwe muri iryo tegeko kivuga ku kimenyetso cy'amatora. Iri tegeko risaba ko buri wese yongera kwiyandikisha kugira ngo atore mu buryo bw'umuntu kandi impushya ze zo gutwara imodoka, ID NYAMARE, cyangwa imyangamugayo ya gisirikare ntizihagije". Kandi mu ijambo rye ryo ku itariki ya 21 Mutarama, mu nama yabereye ku Nteko Nkuru y'Isi y'Igihugu i Davos mu Busuwisi, yongeyeho ati "turimo imbere y'isi mu by'ubwenge bufite imbaraga nyinshi. Turimo imbere y'u Bushinwa mu buryo bufite imbaraga nyinshi". Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika ni zo ziyoboye Ubushinwa mu gukora utubumbano n'ubugenzuzi bw'isoko.

claim: Abahanga mu by'ubwubatsi muri Noruveje bakoze "ibishyimbo by'ubushyuhe" by'ubushyuhe ku nkoni kugira ngo bisimbuze ahantu inyamaswa zibaho zifite icyayi cyo mu nyanja ya Arctic kizimira.
evidence: Ku itariki ya 24 Nzeri 2025, hari ikiganiro cyagiye cyakwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga kivuga ko abahanga bo muri Noruveje bari bakoze ikintu gishya cyo gufasha inyenzi zo mu nyanja ya Arctic: "ibishyimbo by'urubura" by'amazi bigenda bireremba, biha inyamaswa ahantu ho "kuruhuka, kurera abana, no kubaho" mu gihe umubumbe wari ukomeje kwiyongera, n'ubwiherero bw'inyanja bwari bwarasubitswe kuri X, Facebook na Instagram. Ibiganiro byinshi byavugaga ko izo mpeta zakozwe n' "ibikoresho bidasubirwaho, bidafite ubumara", ko zari zifite imyenda yo "kubuza inyenzi kugwa" kandi ko zari zifite sensore zo kugenzura umubare w'abantu bo mu nyanja ya Arctic. Ibiganiro akenshi byarangwaga n'ishusho igaragaza ko inyenzi zigeze kuba ziri hejuru y'imwe muri izo mpeta z'ubwiherero, zigaragaza ko zigaragaza ubwenzi, bikaba bishoboka ko zigereranya Noruveje.

claim: Umwuka w'izuba n'umuyaga ntibigera kuri 3% by'ingufu z'isi.
evidence: Mu gihe Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika zari zishinzwe gufunga umuyoboro wa Irani wa Hormuz, icyo gihe kimwe cya gatanu cy'ibikomoka ku mavuta ku isi, CNN yakomeje kubaza umunyamabanga ushinzwe ingufu, Chris Wright, niba Amerika yagombye gutakariza icyizere ku mavuta, ahubwo igakoresha imbaraga zisubirwamo, urugero nk'izuba n'izuba.

claim: Ku itariki ya 6 Gicurasi 2026, umukozi wa Evangelical Mark Burns yakoze umuhango wo kwegurira Imana igishushanyo cya zahabu cya Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump, mu gace ka Mar-a-Lago muri leta ya Florida.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo, Mark Burns ni we wayoboye ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry'igishushanyo cya zahabu cya Trump muri Gicurasi 2026. Icyakora, abasomyi ba Snopes batwoherereje ibibazo byinshi ku gishushanyo, benshi bakaba bari bazi ko cyari mu Mar-a-Lago Club ya Perezida, kandi ko cyari gifite uburebure bw'ibirenge 20. Abenshi mu bakoreshaga imbuga nkoranyambaga bavugaga ko hari umukozi w'Imana w'Umukristo wari warashyizeho igishushanyo cya zahabu cya Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Donald Trump, mu imwe mu makipe ya Trump yo muri Florida. Abenshi mu bakoreshaga ikinyoma bagaragaje ko bagaragaje amashusho agaragaza igishushanyo cya Trump cya zahabu gifite ukuboko kw'ikirenge kwari hejuru, bakikijwe n'abareba. Abenshi mu basomyi ba Snopes batwoherereje ibibazo byinshi ku gishushanyo, benshi bakaba bari bazi ko cyari mu Mar-a-Lago Club ya Perezida, bakavuga ko gifite uburebure bw'ibirenge 20.

claim: Abapolisi bo mu karere ka LA bakunze kwifatanya mu myigaragambyo y'urukundo mu gihe cy'impeshyi, bashyize umuriro ku modoka ya Jeep.
evidence: Mu gihe cy'imvururu za vuba aha zabereye i Los Angeles, abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bakwirakwije videwo ivuga ko igaragaza abantu batangiye imvururu bashyira umuriro ku modoka ya Jeep mu gihe cy'imvururu.Umunsi umwe ukoresha X yashyize hanze agafoto k'iyo modoka, ahanditse ngo "Abategetsi b'urukundo bo mu gace ka LA baharanira amahoro mu gihe cy'imyigaragambyo y'amahoro bashyira umuriro ku modoka ya Jeep".

claim: Umuhanzikazi akaba n'umukinnyi w'indirimbo Cher yigeze kuvuga kuri Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump ati "ni umunyabyaha, ni umuntu uteje akaga, kandi ibyo azanira igihugu cyanjye, ibyo yazanye mu gihugu cyanjye, ni ugukabya no kutizerana, ndetse n'ubwibone runaka mu matsinda runaka".
evidence: Nubwo iyi nkuru ya Cher yagaragajwe neza ko ari we wari uyikoresheje, yayitanze mu birori byabereye i Ottawa muri Ontario mu mwaka wa 2016. Abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bayiherutseho hafi mu myaka icumi nyuma yaho, ntibahaye itariki y'ibyo yavuze. Mu mpera z'umwaka wa 2025 no mu ntangiriro z'umwaka wa 2026, hakwirakwijwe amakuru yo kuri interineti avuga ko umuririmbyi n'umukinnyi Cher yise Perezida wa Amerika Donald Trump "umusazi" avuga ko yabyukije "ubwikunde n'ukudaha agaciro" muri Amerika.

claim: Perezida Trump wa Amerika yabujije Tesla gukora muri Amerika nyuma yo guhangana na Elon Musk, umuyobozi mukuru w'iyi sosiyete.
evidence: Mu mashusho yafashwe na Elon Musk, Trump bivugwa ko ari we uvuga ati "Uyu munsi, ndi hano kugira ngo ntange amakuru ko nzategeka ko Tesla zose zitangwa muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, guhita zitangira guhera ubu. Nk'uko buri wese abizi, Elon yankuye mu mugongo iminsi mike ishize, maze ajya ku rubuga rwe rwa X, abeshya ku birebana n'uruhare rwanjye mu nyandiko za Epstein...Nta muntu n'umwe ukunda Teslas, keretse niba uri nerd, zikomeza gutwika kandi zikagwa..." Abakoresha ba Multiple X na Facebook, barebye iyi videwo y'amasegonda 59 irimo amagambo agira ati "Donald Trump yahagaritse Tesla Production In USA".

claim: Umutwe w'abarwanyi bo muri Afghanistan warakanguriye ISI, wiyemeza kwihorera ku gitero cyagabwe n'iterabwoba cya Pahalgam.
evidence: Videwo igaragaza ko abagize 'Liberation Front of Afghanistan' bifuza kwihorera ku gitero cy'iterabwoba cyagabwe i Pahalgam muri Jammu & Kashmir, cyahitanye abantu 26, kuko "ivunura nta mipaka rifite" ryamaze kujya ku mbuga nkoranyambaga.Mu mashusho yafashwe na virusi, bivugwa ko itsinda ry'Abanyafurika rifite ubwoba bwo "kugabanya umutwe w'iterabwoba wa ISI, ingirabuzimafatizo ku ngirabuzimafatizo, ubugingo ku bugingo".Iyo videwo y'iminota mirongo itanu n'ibiri, irimo isohoka cyane kuri X na Facebook, ifite amagambo agira ati "The Liberation Front of Afghanistan warns: "Pahalgam ntigihindutse.Igihe cyose ISI ifashe ingabo mu gihugu cya Pakistan cyangwa indi mirwano izaba yahagurukiye ahandi, izaba yaciwe kandi ihagaritswe".Nubwo bimeze bityo, raporo ivuga ko ari indimi itari ukuri, ishobora kuboneka hano, kandi ikurikiraho amagambo yavuzwe na Facebook na J.J. Raffrey Jaffrey, J.

claim: Mu ntangiriro z'Ugushyingo 2025, guverinoma ya Perezida Donald Trump yari imaze gukoresha miliyoni 750 z'amadolari y'umusoro mu kwishyura inguzanyo z'amafaranga yo kwishyura gahunda yihariye yo kugaburira abagore, abana n'abana.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyi mibare mu gihe cy'ubuhagarike bwa guverinoma y'u Burayi mu ntangiriro z'Ugushyingo 2025, abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bavugaga ko Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump yakoresheje miliyoni 750 z'amadolari y'umusoro kugira ngo akomeze gukora gahunda yihariye yo kugaburira abagore, abana n'abana. Kongere yananiwe gutanga amafaranga y'umwaka wose ku gahunda nyinshi za leta, harimo n'iyo gahunda  izwi nka WIC  kuko abadepite bagumye mu ruhagarara ku birebana no kongera gufungura guverinoma. Ibiganiro byerekeza ku nkuru ya Politico byavugaga ko amafaranga y'umusoro ari miliyoni 450 y'amadolari yashyizwe ku wa 31 Ukwakira, nyuma y'uko mu kwezi kwa cumi  mbere y'aho yashyizwe mu bikorwa amafaranga y'umusoro ari miliyoni 750 y'amadolari y'umusoro yakoreshejwe mu gushyigikira WIC. Ibiganiro byateye abasomyi benshi ba Snopes kutwoherereza ubutumwa no gushakisha urubuga rwacu kugira ngo bamenye niba koko ubutegetsi bwa Trump bwakoresheje miliyoni 750 z'amadolari

evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo Ikiganiro cy'uko Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump yasabye abagenzi guhindukira bakava kuri dizeli bakajya kuri lisansi kugira ngo bagabanye ibiciro by'ibikomoka ku masoko y'ibikomoka ku masoko y'ibikomoka ku masoko y'ibikomoka ku masoko, cyasohotse muri Werurwe 2026. claim: Ubwicanyi muri Minneapolis bwagabanutseho 25, 30% kuko twamaze gukuraho abagizi ba nabi babarirwa mu bihumbi bo muri ako gace.
evidence: Perezida Donald Trump yavuze ko ibikorwa bye byo gufunga ubwimukira byatumye ubugizi bwa nabi bugwa muri Minneapolis.Mu kiganiro cya mbere ya Super Bowl, Tom Llamas wa NBC yabajije Trump ibijyanye n'ubugizi bwa nabi nyuma y'ibyumweru abasirikare barashe Abanyamerika babiri, Renee Good na Alex Pretti, i Minneapolis. "Ibipimo by'ubwicanyi muri Minnesota, cyane cyane i Minneapolis, byagabanutseho 25, 30% kuko twamaze gukuraho abagizi ba nabi ibihumbi n'ibihumbi mu gace", Trump avuga. "Aba ni abagizi ba nabi b'inkazi, benshi muri bo bakaba baraje, abenshi muri bo bakaba baraje hakurya y'umupaka".Ubutegetsi bwa Trump bwatangije Operation Metro Surge mu mpera za 2025 muri Minnesota bufite intego yo gufata abantu muri Amerika mu buryo butemewe n'amategeko.Ibikorwa by'ubugizi bwa nabi bya leta byafashe abasirikare barenga 4,000 muri icyo gikorwa, ari na byo White House ku itariki ya 4 Gashyantare.

claim: Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Donald Trump, yababariye umunyabinyoma wari uhanishwa kwiba amafaranga menshi kurusha ayo yafatiwe mu bugizi bwa nabi bukomeye bw'ubudehe muri Minnesota, aho abanyamuryango b'abaturage bo muri leta ya Minnesota bari batuye muri Somaliya.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyo mibare, Trump ntiyababariye umunyabinyoma Philip Esformes.Mu mwaka wa 2020, Trump yahinduye igihano cye cy'imyaka 20 agisa n'icyo yari amaze.Esformes akomeza kubazwa amadolari miliyoni 44.2 y'amadolari y'inyongera no gufatirwa.Esformes yahamwe n'icyaha cyo kwiba amadolari miliyari 1.3 kuri Medicaid na Medicare.Ikiciro rusange cy'amafaranga yibwe muri Minnesota ntikiramenyekana.Umushikirizamanza w'ibanze wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Joseph H. Thompson, yavuze ko abarezi bashobora kuba barabye amadolari miliyari 9 kuva mu mwaka wa 2018 muri gahunda zitandukanye z'ubudehe.Ibitigiri bya Minnesota Star Tribune byo mu ntangiriro z'ukwezi kwa 12 mu mwaka wa 2025 byagaragaje ko amafaranga yibwe ari amadolari miriyoni 217.7 y'amadolari, ariko leta ikaba yarabihakanaga.Mu gihe inkuru z'amafaranga yibwe muri Minnesota mu kwezi kwa 12 mu mwaka wa 2025 zakwirakwifashishwaga, aho abantu benshi bashinjwaga amafaranga y'abasomaliya  bigatuma
