claim: Uwahoze ari Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Barack Obama, yakuye mu biro by'i Oval igishushanyo cy'uwahoze ari Minisitiri w'Intebe w'u Bwongereza, Winston Churchill, maze asubira mu Bwongereza.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo, uwatangiye kuyobora Obama, George W. Bush, yafashe umwenda wa Churchill mu biro bya Oval kuva mu mwaka wa 2001 kugeza ku iherezo ry'ubutegetsi bwe. Uwo muhanda wari umwenda uturutse mu Isomero ry'Ubumenyi rya Leta y'Ubwongereza. Igihe Obama yafataga ubutegetsi, White House yashubije uwo muhanda wari waramwemereye. Obama yakomeje kwerekana umwenda wa Churchill utandukanye hanze y'icyumba cy'Amahoro mu gihe cy'ubutegetsi bwe. Nta gihamya igaragaza ko umwenda wa Bush wari waramwemereye ku buryo bw'umubiri, washubije hakurya y'Inyanja ya Atalantika mu ntangiriro y'ubutegetsi bwa Obama. Uwo muhanda wagumye ku biro by'ubwami bw'u Bwongereza i Washington, kugeza nibura mu mwaka wa 2012, nk'uko raporo zivuga ibyo muri ambasadeya. Uwatangiye gusubiza umwenda wa Churchill, icyo gihe Bush yari yandikaga, ntibyari byumvikana. Obama yasaga n'uwatanze igitekerezo mu kiganiro n'itangazamakuru cyo mu mwaka wa 2016 ko yafashe umwanzuro wo gusimbuza umwenda wa Churchill

claim: Florida: #51 mu kwita ku buzima bw'ibanze bwo mu mutwe, #1 mu mafaranga y'ubwishingizi bwo mu rugo, #1 mu bucuruzi bw'ibinyoma ku bageze mu za bukuru, #1 mu kwishyura imishahara.
evidence: Ese muri leta ya Florida ni ho haboneka ibibazo bikomeye mu gihugu ku bijyanye n'ubuzima bwo mu mutwe, uburiganya ku bageze mu za bukuru, gutanga amafaranga y'ubwishingizi ku nyir'inzu no kongera amazu y'ubwishingizi? Ni byo guverineri wa leta ya California Gavin Newsom yavuze. Guverineri w'Abademokarate yagiye ashyira ahabona amakosa y'ibihugu byategekwaga n'Abaturage ba Repubulika mu nyandiko ze za vuba aha no mu bitekerezo bye. Muri Kamena, mu gihe cy'imyigaragambyo yo mu mujyi wa Los Angeles ku bikorwa bya ICE, Newsom yavuganye n'abaturage ba Repubulika ku bijyanye n'ibiciro by'ubwicanyi bw'abantu bo mu bihugu byabo. Muri Nyakanga, yagereranyije amafaranga California y'ishami n'ayo leta ya Texas. Ubu ajya muri Florida, aho avuga amabwiriza yavuye ku butegetsi bwa Trump no ku guverineri wa leta ya Florida Ron DeSantis yo gukuraho ibipimo by'imihanda bivuga ko uburenganzira bwa LGBT buherutse gushyirwaho.

claim: Bilawal Bhutto Zardari yavuze ko hari abakozi ba Pakistani bicaye mu Nteko Ishinga Amategeko y'u Buhinde.
evidence: Videwo ivuga ko igaragaza Perezida wa Pakistan People's Party, Bilawal Bhutto Zardari, avuga ko 'abakozi ba Pakistani bari mu Nteko Ishinga Amategeko y'u Buhinde' mu gihe yaganiraga n'Inteko Ishinga Amategeko y'igihugu cye, iri gusohoka ku mbuga nkoranyambaga.Ibice by'amashusho bigabanyijemo kabiri bivugwa ko bigaragaza Bhutto Zardari arimo abwira inteko ishinga Amategeko ya Pakistan ati "Ni nde utera igitero mu mwijima w'ijoro? Dushobora no gukwirakwiza propagande yacu imbere ya Minisitiri w'Intebe w'u Buhinde mu Nteko Ishinga Amategeko...Abantu bacu bari mu Nteko Ishinga Amategeko yabo".Kimwe n'iyi clip, igaragaza n'ijambo ry'umuyobozi w'Inteko Ishinga Amategeko Gaurav Gogoi aherutse kuvuga mu Nteko Ishinga Amategeko ku bijyanye n'Igitero Sindoor.Noneho, Newschecker yabonye ko iyi videwo yafashwe uko yakabaye.

claim: Abantu bafite ubwishingizi binyuze ku itegeko rivuga ko bitabwaho ku giciro cy'ubuvuzi ku giciro cy'ubudehe, bazabona indishyi ziyongeraho 75% guhera ku itariki ya 1 Ugushyingo niba inguzanyo z'ubwishingizi zidakongerewe, harimo n'izikuba kabiri mu bice by'icyaro.
evidence: Mu kiganiro cyabaye kuri CBS ku itariki ya 28 Nzeri, "Face the Nation" cyatambutse ku itariki ya 28 Nzeri, iminsi itatu mbere y'uko amafaranga ya leta asohora, umuyobozi w'inteko ishinga amategeko Amy Klobuchar wo muri leta ya Minnesota, yavuze ko mu gihe Abaperezida ba Repubulika batagura amafaranga y'ubwishingizi, Abanyamerika benshi bari kubona ko amafaranga y'ubwishingizi bahabwa atagira icyo ahindura. Klobuchar yavuze ko Abanyamerika bo mu cyaro, harimo n'abahinzi, bazakorerwaho ingaruka zidakwiriye.

claim: Icyo Minisitiri w'Intebe wa Sri Lanka yavuze ku mwanzuro w'urukiko wo kumwicisha
evidence: "Mu bantu 12 baciriwe urwo gupfa, nta n'umwe ukomoka i Malimawa. Ni abanyamuryango ba JVP na Peratugami - Minisitiri w'Intebe Chathuranga Abeysinghe", hakoreshejwe inyandiko mu rurimi rw'igisinhala ku ishusho yo kuri Facebook yashyizwe ahagaragara ku wa 11 Gashyantare 2026.

claim: Muri Kanama 2025, Senateri Rick Scott wo muri leta ya Florida yashyize ahagaragara amafaranga asaga miriyoni 26 y'amadolari y'Amerika mu bikorwa by'ubucuruzi by'ibiro by'imari n'imari, nyuma y'umwaka urenga ku gihe cyategetswe n'amategeko.
evidence: Muri Kanama 2025, Scott yashyikirije amande raporo enye z'ibikorwa bitandukanye, ariko ntizongeraho ibicuruzwa bishya. Muri Kanama 2025, konti ya X yitwa Unusual Whales yashyize ahagaragara ikirego cy'uko Senateri Rick Scott, Umurepubulika wa Florida, yashyize ahagaragara amafaranga arenga miriyoni 26 y'amadolari mu bikorwa by'ubucuruzi "by'umwaka urenga".Icyemezo cy'uko ibyo bikorwa byatewe n'igihe cy'ikirenga cyari kuba ari ukurenga ku mategeko ya leta, asaba ko abagize Kongere bose (n'abandi bantu babagose) bashyira ahagaragara ibyo bikorwa byose by'umutungo bifite agaciro karenga $1,000 mu minsi 30.Icyo kirego cyakwirakwiriye ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, maze abasomyi ba Snopes bashakisha urubuga bashaka kumenya byinshi ku birebana n'ibyo bitamenyekanye.

claim: Mu Gushyingo 2025, Perezida Trump yasabye Minisiteri y'Ubucuruzi gushyiraho inguzanyo z'imodoka z'imyaka 15.
evidence: Urugero, hari ubutumwa kuri X bwashyizwe ahagaragara bwagabanyije igishushanyo gisa n'itangazo ry'ibiro by'ibiro by'ishami by'Amerika ku itariki ya 10 Ugushyingo (bishyizwe ahagaragara): Inyandiko kuri iyo shusho yasomye ngo: UMWAMI W'IBAPAMBAYEHO DONALD J. TRUMP Uko akomeza gukora cyane kugira ngo inzozi z'Amerika zigere kuri bose, Perezida Trump uyu munsi yasabye Minisiteri y'Ubucuruzi n'Ubucuruzi gushyiraho uburyo bwo kugura imodoka bugira ingaruka nziza binyuze mu gutanga inguzanyo z'imodoka z'imyaka 15! Abaminisitiri Duffy na Lutnick baramaze kubikoraho! Gutanga Amerika! Igishushanyo nk'icyo cyagaragaraga no mu zindi nyandiko za X na Facebook. Abenshi mu basomyi basaga n'abisobanura nk'aho ibyo bitekerezo ari ugusubiza ibintu mu buryo bw'ukuri.

claim: Umugabo utari umuturage wa Amerika yatoye Mamdani mu matora y'umukuru w'umugi wa NYC.
evidence: Ese umuntu utari umuturage wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika cyangwa se akaba ari n'umuturage w'umuturage, yaba yageze mu mujyi wa New York mu minsi ibiri mbere y'amatora maze agahitamo Mamdani ngo abe meya? Oya, si byo: iyo nyandiko yemeje ko yari inkuru y'urwenya. Kugira ngo bamenye urwenya rwabo, berekanye aho basanze ifoto y'amajwi agaragaza izina rya Zohran Mamdani. Abatora batarateganyijwe muri New York biyandikisha mu biro by'itora bahawe amajwi atandukanye, bashyikirizwa inyandiko z'umwirondoro zirimo ibyangombwa bigaragaza ko baba muri New York. Icyo kirego cyabonetse ku itariki ya 4 Ugushyingo 2025 kuri konti ya X.com @YazanXBT (igaragajwe hano) yafungutseho iti: "Nageze muri NYC hashize iminsi 2 ntabwo ndi umuturage wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika cyangwa se mama nari mfite, kandi ibyo bakoze mu gihe gito cyane byari bimeze nk'aho ari aderesi y'umuturage wa V.

claim: Umuhanzikazi Freddie Mercury ntiyaririmbye "of the world" mu mpera z'indirimbo y'itsinda "We Are the Champions, Queen" yabanje gusohoka mu 1977.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo, Freddie Mercury ntiyaririmbye 'iby'isi' mu mpera z'iyerekwa ry'umwimerere ryo mu mwaka wa 1977 ry'indirimbo "We Are the Champions". Icyakora... ... umurongo wari mu magambo y'indirimbo nk'uko wacapwe ku rukuta rw'imbere rw'igitabo cy'umwimerere cy'umwimerere cyo mu mwaka wa 1977 cyanditswe ku rubuga rwa videwo z'ibitaramo bya Queen, wagaragaje ko Mercury yakundaga kuririmba iyo ndirimbo mu mpera z'iyo ndirimbo. Kuva indirimbo ya Queen "We Are the Champions" yatangira mu mwaka wa 1977, abantu benshi bagiye baririmba indirimbo "y'isi" bafite ishyaka. "Ariko se koko, ni uko iyo ndirimbo irangira? Bamwe mu bateze amatwi bamaze gusuzuma iyo ndirimbo ku bwoko bwa vinyl no ku mbuga nkoranyambaga nk'iza Spotify, babonye ko "iy'isi" ya nyuma ntaho yari iboneka.Mu gihe cy'imyaka myinshi, inyandiko nyinshi n'inyandiko nyinshi zakwirakwiriye kuri interineti, zemeza ko iyo mvugo itandukanye n'indirimbo z'umwimerere

claim: Umukuru w'ingabo za Amerika, George Patton Jr. yigeze kuvuga ati "Imana ibabarire abanzi banjye, kuko nanjye ntababarire".
evidence: Ku birebana n'icyo gitekerezo, Patton mu by'ukuri yagaragaje igitekerezo gisa n'icyo, nubwo gifite iherezo ritandukanye.Igitabo cy'umwimerere, gishobora kuboneka mu nyandiko ye y'ibyabaye nyuma y'urupfu rwe mu mwaka wa 1947, yitwa "War as I Knew It", kigira kiti "Imana ibabarire abanzi banjye, kuko bazazikenera".Turacyari gushaka inyandiko zemeza ko Patton yigeze kuvuga cyangwa kwandika igihano kigira kiti "Imana ibabarire abanzi banjye, kuko ntabazabikora".Mu gihe cy'imyaka myinshi, abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bagiye bashyiraho igitekerezo cyavuzwe ko cyavuzwe na Gen. George Patton Jr., bavuga ko umuyobozi w'ingabo z'intambara ya kabiri y'isi yose yigeze kuvuga ati "Imana ibabarire abanzi banjye, kuko ntazabigenza ntyo".

claim: Perezida w'ishami ry'abagore rya AIMIM ashimira Deepak Kumar.
evidence: Ishusho ikwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, ivuga ko igaragaza perezida w'ishami ry'abagore rya All India Majlis-e-Ittehadul Muslimeen (AIMIM) arimo gusuhuza umuntu witwa "Mohammad Deepak." (Archive Link) Izina 'Mohammad Deepak' ryaje kumenyekana ku wa 26 Mutarama 2026, mu gihe cy'impaka zabereye mu gace ka Kotdwar, mu ntara ya Uttarakhand, ku iduka ry'imyenda ry'Abisilamu, ryitwa Baba School Garments.

claim: "Twabonye imirongo 35 y'umurongo w'umurongo w'inzira [wo kugenderaho abantu] wari usinziriye cyangwa utarakora".  Ramaphosa
evidence: Amagambo ya Ramaphosa avuga ko umujyi wa Cape Town ufite amateka mabi yo kwagura uburyo bwo kugera ku mbuga nkoranyambaga ari ayo gushuka, kandi ko avuga ko umujyi ushyiraho amafaranga make ku munyagihugu mu mijyi no mu byaro bidasanzwe, nta shingiro afite. Africa Check yavuze ko ibyo Badenhorst yavuze ku birebana n'umubare w'amafaranga y'ibikoranabuhanga mu mujyi wa Cape Town azajya ku miryango ifite amikoro make nta shingiro bifite, ariko ko ari byo koko, avuga ko umujyi w'imyaka itatu ushyiraho umujyi urenze kure uw'indi mijyi yo mu gihugu.

claim: Ikinyoma: Abana b'abaciye mu myaka y'amavuko ubu bemerewe kujya mu gisirikare muri Ukraine
evidence: Mu by'ukuri, amategeko ya Ukraine ntemerera abantu bari munsi y'imyaka 18 kujya mu gisirikare. Ikiganiro cyavuzwe ku mudepite w'Umukreniya ni ikinyoma rwose. Ibinyamakuru byo muri Kremlin byamamaje ko Ukraine yemereye abana b'imyaka 17 gusinya amasezerano n'Ingabo. Amakuru avuga ko hari amagambo yavuzwe kuri televiziyo n'umudepite w'Umukreniya Ruslan Horbenko, uvuga ko ubu kujya mu gisirikare byemewe kuva ku myaka 17.

claim: Asaduddin Owaisi arimo arakorera Lord Hanuman aarti mu rusengero.
evidence: Videwo ikwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga igaragaza umuyobozi wa AIMIM, Asaduddin Owaisi arimo akora Hanuman aarti, abantu batari bake, harimo n'umupadiri, babonetse iruhande rwe. Abakoresha benshi basangiye videwo, bavuga ko ari iy'ukuri. Screengrab yo mu nyandiko ya X ya @ManojSr60583090 Evidence Twahise dushakisha amakuru yo mu itangazamakuru avuga ko Asaduddin Owaisi yari mu rusengero cyangwa akora aarti, ariko ntihasanga amakuru yemeje. Iyo ibyo biba ari ko biri, amashusho atari gusa y'ukuntu akora aartium, ahubwo n'amakuru afitanye isano na yo yari kuvugwaho cyane mu itangazamakuru no mu nzego za politiki.

claim: Ibaruwa yashyizwe ku rubuga rwa interineti muri Werurwe 2026 ni ubutumwa busobanutse neza Joe Kent, umuyobozi w'Ikigo cy'Igihugu gishinzwe kurwanya iterabwoba muri Amerika, yatangaje ko yasezeye ku butegetsi kubera intambara Amerika na Isirayeli zashyize kuri Irani.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo Mu kwezi kwa Werurwe 2026, Joe Kent, umuyobozi w'Ikigo cy'Igihugu gishinzwe kurwanya iterabwoba muri Amerika, akaba ari n'umushyigikiye ukomeye wa Perezida Donald Trump kuva mu mwaka wa 2020 yatangaje ko yeguye, asobanura intambara Trump yarwanye na Irani.Ibice n'ibisobanuro byerekanaga ko yari yeguye, byaje gukwirakwira ku rubuga rwa interineti, maze abasomyi ba Snopes basaka urubuga maze bandika bashaka kumenya niba iyo baruwa ari iy'ukuri.Iyi baruwa yari iy'ukuri; Kent yayitangiye mu ntangiriro z'uyu mwaka, ku itariki ya 17 Werurwe 2026.Kuva uyu munsi, ubutumwa bwe bwa X (bishyinguriwe) bumaze kubonwa n'abantu barenga miriyoni 94 (bishyingurwa).Iyi shusho y'iryo baruwa yari ifite umutwe ugira uti: "Nyuma y'ibitekerezo byinshi, nafashe umwanzuro wo kwegura ku mwanya wanjye wo kuba umuyobozi w'Ikigo cy'Igihugu Gishinzwe kurwanya iterabwoba, kuva uyu munsi.Sepfo sinashobora gushyigikira neza abahanga mu

evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo, umurongo nyawo wavuzwe n'umukinnyi Tom Hanks nk'umukinnyi Forrest Gump muri iyi filime ni uwu: "Mama yahoraga avuga ko ubuzima ari nk'agasanduku k'amatafari. Nta na kimwe muri ibyo bice cyahura neza n'amagambo yatanzwe n'abantu benshi agira ati "Ubuzima ni nk'agasanduku k'amatafari".

claim: Iyi myongera ituma GLP-1 irushaho gukora neza kandi igafasha kurwanya insulini.
evidence: "Iki gikorwa kigira ingaruka zingana n'iza Ozempic, byanze bikunze, nta ngaruka mbi kandi nta mishyikirano, " ni ko uwatangaga disikuru avuga mu kiganiro cyo kuri Facebook cyo ku wa 27 Werurwe 2026.Uwo muntu ashishikariza abarebye gutekereza ku gifatika gikubiyemo yerba mate - icyayi cy'ibyatsi gikoreshwa cyane muri Amerika y'Epfo no mu Burasirazuba - avuga ko icyo gifatika gishobora gufasha mu kurwanya insulini, kugabanya ibiro no kugabanya ingufu (bishyizwe aha).Abakoresha ba TikTok, Facebook na Instagram bagurisha icyo gikoresho kimwe bakoresheje imbuga bakorana mu mikoreshereze yabo, na bo batangaje ko gifatika nk'"amazi arwanya insulini, " bavuga ko cyagiriwe inama n'abaganga bagereranya n'icyayi cyitwa "gluc-like-peptide-1, cyangwa GLP-1, cyinjijwe mu maraso.

evidence: Repubulika ya Repubulika Claudia Tenney, ufite akarere k'inteko ishinga amategeko kagera hafi muri New York yo hagati, aherutse kwihesha agaciro ko gufasha gutera imbere uruganda rukomeye rw'ibikomoka ku bintu by'ibanze mu rwego rw'ikoranabuhanga i Clay, muri leta ya New York, mu majyaruguru ya Syracuse. "Iyi gahunda izatuma habaho imirimo 50,000 kandi ikomeze ibikorwa byo gukora ibikomoka ku bintu by'ibikomoka ku bintu by'ibanze mu gihugu hose.

claim: Ni mu gihe habayeho guhangana hagati y'umushikiranganji wa BJP n'umukuru w'akarere muri Uttar Pradesh.
evidence: Videwo igaragaza abagabo babiri barimo gutongana ku buryo bw'umubiri iriko irakwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Iyi clip irimo gusaranganywa n'abavuga ko igaragaza imirwano hagati y'umushikiranganji wa BJP n'umushikiranganji w'akarere muri Uttar Pradesh. Umukoresha wa Facebook yashyize hanze iyo videwo igaragaza ko hari imirwano hagati y'umushikiranganji w'akarere n'umushikiranganji wa BJP....ku rubuga rwa Youtube...😁 Urugamba hagati y'umushikiranganji w'akarere n'umushikiranganji wa BJP....mu UP... 😁 Ushobora kureba iyi nkuru hano. FACT CHECK NewsMobile yasuzumye iyo videwo igaragaza ko ari iy'ikinyoma, kandi igaragaza ko ibyo ivuga ari ibinyoma. Kugira ngo yemeze icyo kinyoma, ibice by'ingenzi by'iyo videwo byakuwe bigashakorwa hakoreshejwe gushakisha amashusho. Ibi byatumye habaho inkuru y'ibanze yasohotse na ABP Live ku itariki ya 17 Mutarama 2018, igaragaza ko ibintu bimwe na bimwe byahindutse.

claim: Umunyamabanga ushinzwe umutekano wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Pete Hegseth, yagize ati "kurebera mu byiciro by'intambara, cyangwa mu by'ukuri mu byiciro by'ubundi bwoko bwose, no kubona ingabo z'ibinyampeke birarambirwa, kimwe n'uko kubona ba jenerali n'abamerijala b'ibinyampeke mu byumba bya Pentagon no mu mirimo yo kuyobora ibihugu no ku isi yose, bidashobora kwemerwa".
evidence: Ku itariki ya 30 Nzeri 2025, Umunyamabanga ushinzwe umutekano wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Pete Hegseth, yatumiye inama y'abasirikare bakuru b'abasirikare bakuru ku kigo cya Quantico Marine Corps muri Virginia, aho itangazamakuru ry'ibanze ryavuze ko ari inama y'umunsi wa nyuma. Muri iyo nama, Hegseth yatanze disikuru ku bayobozi bari bateraniye aho aho aho, aho yavuze ko yanenze abasirikare "bagore" n'abategetsi bakuru. Abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga benshi bagaragaje ibice by'ijambo rya Hegseth. Hari ubutumwa bwagize buti: Hegseth ahamagara abasirikare n'abategetsi bakuru. Avuga ko buri wese mu bagize igisirikare azajya apfa ikizamini cya buri munsi kabiri mu mwaka niba ashaka gukomeza kuba umwe mu bagize igisirikare. Avuga ko kuba umusirikare "atemewe".

claim: Ibitabo by'ubutegetsi bya Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika byasohotse byemeje ko ubuyobozi bwa Perezida Donald Trump bwari bugerageza "ingamba zo guhagarika ingendo" hagati mu gihugu hagati mu mwaka wa 2025.

claim: Polisi: Abashyigikiye politiki ntibateje imiriro y'inkongi y'umuriro muri Oregon
evidence: Umuyaga w'igihu utagezeho kandi utari bwigere uboneka mu mateka, watembaga mu mpinga z'imisozi ya Cascade kuva ku gicamunsi cyo ku wa Mbere tariki ya 7 Nzeri kugeza mu gitondo cyo ku wa Kabiri tariki ya 8 Nzeri, utuma umuriro ukomeza kwiyongera mu buryo bwihuse.Ibi bintu bitangaje ku gihe cy'umwaka; imiyaga ikomeye y'iki cyiciro irushaho kugaragara mu mezi y'imbeho.Uretse ubushyuhe, ni indi ngero y'imihindagurikire y'ikirere iriho.

claim: Ibishushanyo bigaragaza isasu ryabaye ku itariki ya 10 Ugushyingo 2025, ryabaye mu kigo kitukura cya Delhi.
evidence: Ku itariki ya 10 Ugushyingo 2025, imodoka yaturitse hafi y'irembo rya 1 rya sitasiyo ya metero ya Red Fort i New Delhi, ihitana abantu bagera kuri cumi na batatu ikakomeretsa abandi benshi.Iperereza ryashyikirijwe Ikigo cy'Igihugu gishinzwe Ubugenzacyaha (NIA), abategetsi bagasaba itegeko rigenga ibikorwa by'urukozasoni (prevention) no gusuzuma imikorere y'imodoka y'iterabwoba (aha, aha).Ibyo bintu byabayeho nyuma y'icyo gitero, amashusho menshi yatangiye gukwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, avuga ko agaragaza amashusho y'ibyabereye mu kirombe cya Delhi Red Fort.Dore ibyo twize muri iyi nkuru.Ibihamya: Amashusho agaragaza ko igisasu cya Delhi Red Fort cyabaye ku itariki ya 10 Ugushyingo 2025.Iby'ukuri: Nta na kimwe mu mashusho ya virusi gifitwe n'isasu rya Delhi Red Fort.Ifoto ya mbere ni iy'imodoka ya 2014 iherereye mu gace ka Haret Hreik mu mujyi wa Beirut, mu gihe iya kabiri ni iy'ib

claim: Ubushakashatsi bwakozwe bwagaragaje ko 23% by'Abanyamerika ari bo bonyine bashobora kwerekana Irani ku ikarita.
evidence: Muri Werurwe 2026, ubwo intambara hagati ya Amerika na Isirayeli na Iran yari igenda irushaho kwiyongera, inyandiko zari zikwirakwira ku mbuga nkoranyambaga zavugaga ko 23% gusa by'Abanyamerika ari bo bashoboraga kwerekana Irani ku ikarita. Izo nyandiko akenshi zari zifite amashusho agaragaza ikarita y'Iburasirazuba bwo Hagati kandi akenshi zakoreshwaga mu kunenga ubumenyi bw'abaturage bo muri Amerika ku birebana n'ubumenyi bw'ubutaka cyangwa ubumenyi bwabo mu by'isi. Urugero, umwe mu bakoreshaga ikoranabuhanga rya X yashyize hamwe ishusho yari ifite umutwe uvuga ngo "Abanyamerika basabwe kwerekana Irani ku ikarita", ashyiraho iyi nyandiko: "Nizeye ko ibyo bitari ukuri..." Iyo shusho ivuga ko "23% by'Abanyamerika ari bo bonyine bashoboraga kwerekana Irani ku ikarita". "Abenshi mu bakoresha ikoranabuhanga rya Amerika ntibashobora kubona Irani ku ikarita", undi muntu yavuze ko hari igihe kirekire, amakarita y'abanyamerika yo ku isi cyangwa ku bumenyi bwa politiki ya Amerika yagiye yiyongera.

claim: Amakuru yo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga yabonetse ku bantu benshi mu mwaka wa 2024 yagaragaje neza ko Paul McCartney yari yaguze amabaruwa avuye ku mugabo wa mbere w'umunyamerika witwa John Lennon, akayasubiza uwahoze ari umugore wa Lennon, kandi ko yari afite inyandiko yamubwiye ko atagomba kugurisha ibyo yibuka.

McCartney yagaruye ibaruwa imwe ya John Lennon, atari inzandiko nyinshi, kandi yabigenje imyaka myinshi, atari iminsi myinshi, nyuma y'uko inzandiko zagurishijwe.Nta gihamya igaragaza ko McCartney yari yaranditse ibaruwa abwira Cynthia Lennon ko atagomba kugurisha ibyifuzo bye.Mu gihe cy'imyaka myinshi, abakoresha interineti bagiye basangira inkuru ivuga iby'urugendo rw'umutima rw'umuririmbyi Paul McCartney bivugwa ko yakoreye uwahoze ari umugore wa John Lennon, mugenzi we w'aba Beatles.Nk'uko inkuru ibivuga, Cynthia Lennon, wari warashatse John kuva mu mwaka wa 1962 kugeza mu wa 1968 kandi wapfuye mu mwaka wa 2015, yagurishije inzandiko z'urukundo z'umugabo we w'icyamamatswe kugira ngo bamarane na we imibereho nyuma yo gutana kwabo.Kumenya ibyo, McCartney yagurishije ibyo yi

claim: Abadepite bo muri Indiana bagerageje gushyiraho itegeko ryemerera leta kwica abantu ikoresheje ibyumba by'ikirere n'abapolisi barashe.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyo ngingo, inteko ishinga amategeko yo muri Indiana yagerageje gushyiraho itegeko ryemerera leta kwicisha abantu ikoresheje gazi ya nitrojeni cyangwa itsinda ryo kurasa. Iyo iryo tegeko ryaba ryarabaye itegeko, ntibyari byumvikana niba leta yari kubaka ibyumba by'umwuka. Ibihugu byamaze gukoresha gazi ya nitrojeni mu kwicwa, byayigenzuraga binyuze ku munwa, nubwo Arizona bivugwa ko yavuguruye icyumba cy'umuriro cy'urupfu cyayo kugira ngo kizakoreshwe mu gihe kizaza. Mu ntangiriro za 2026, hakwirakwijwe itangazo kuri interineti ry'uko inteko ishinga amategeko yo muri Indiana yagerageje gushyiraho itegeko ryemerera ko abantu bapfa bakoresheje ibyumba by'umuriro n'itsinda ryo kurasa. Ibivugwa byarakwirakwijwe ku mbuga nkoranyambaga nka Facebook, X, TikTok na Instagram. Abasomyi ba Snopes na bo banditse basaba Indiana kubaka ibyumba by'umuriro. Ibivugwa mu ngingo, inteko ishinga amategeko yo muri Indiana, ariko mu by'ukuri, yashyizeho kandi yemeza ko itegeko ryem

claim: Mu mwaka wa 2022, Jay Jones, Umushinjacyaha Mukuru watowe wa Virginia yoherereje ubutumwa bw'amajwi y'urugomo ku wahoze ari Umuvugizi w'Inzu y'Abadepite ya Virginia, Todd Gilbert, n'abana be.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyo mibare, Snopes ntiyigeze asuzuma ubutumwa bw'umwimerere bw'inyandiko; ariko, ubwo yavuganaga na kamera mu ntangiriro z'ukwezi k'Ukwakira 2025, Jones yemeye ku mugaragaro ko ari we watumye ubwo butumwa kandi asaba imbabazi. Mu mpeshyi ya 2025, ikiganiro cyakwirakwiriye ku mbuga nkoranyambaga cy'uko Jay Jones, umujyanama mukuru w'Abademokarate wa Virginia watowe nyuma yo gutsinda amatora yo ku itariki ya 4 Ugushyingo, yigeze kohereza ubutumwa bw'inyandiko bw'urugomo ku muntu wari urwanya ubutegetsi n'abana be. Urugero, abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga za X (bishyizwe mu bubiko), Facebook (bishyizwe mu bubiko) na Instagram (bishyizwe mu bubiko) basanze ibyo bitekerezo mu minsi n'ibyumweru mbere y'umunsi w'amatora.

Iyi ngingo izakurwaho. Kubera iki? Kubera ko abahinzi b'u Buhinde n'abahungu babo nta bwoba bafite ku muntu uwo ari we wese,Dhankhar yavuze ko.

claim: Mu Ukuboza 2025, Minisiteri y'Ubutabera ya Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika yashyize ahagaragara raporo ya FBI, aho umushinjacyaha yavuze ko Perezida Donald Trump yabonye umusore we yica umwana we wari umaze kuvuka, maze umurambo awujugunya mu kiyaga cya Michigan ubwo yari afite imyaka 13, kandi ko Jeffrey Epstein yamuhemukiye kugira ngo agire imibonano mpuzabitsina.

claim: Igishushanyo cya Gandhi cyarimbuwe i Thiruvananthapuram nyuma y'aho ishyaka rya BJP rifatiye ubutegetsi mu kigo cy'umujyi

claim: Mu mpera z'umwaka wa 2025, Minisiteri y'Uburezi yavuze ko itazongera gushyiraho impamyabumenyi nk'impamyabumenyi z'ubumenyingiro: uburezi (harimo n'uburezi bw'icyiciro cya gatatu cy'amashuri yisumbuye), ubuforomo (MSN, DNP), imirimo y'imibereho myiza (MSW, DSW), ubuzima bw'abaturage (MPH, DrPH), umufasha w'umuganga, ubuvuzi bw'imirimo, ubuvuzi bw'umubiri, ubuvuzi bw'ibyiyumvo, uburwayi bw'ururimi n'ubuvugizi bw'amagambo n'ubuvugizi n'ubuvuzi bw'ibikomerezwa.
evidence: Ku birebana n'iyi ngingo, Minisiteri y'Uburezi yasabye ko gahunda zitandukanye za kaminuza zishobora kuvanwa mu cyerekezo cy'"impamyabumenyi z'umwuga" mu birebana no kuba umuntu ashobora guhabwa inguzanyo z'abanyeshuri. Kugeza ubwo iyi nyandiko yandikwaga, icyo cyerekezo ntikiremezwa. Hari n'impamyabumenyi z'ubujyanama na zo zari gushyirwa mu cyerekezo cy'"impamyabumenyi z'umwuga" mu mugambi wa Minisiteri y'Uburezi. Ntibyumvikanaga niba iki cyemezo, cyari kugira ingaruka ku mipaka y'inguzanyo z'abanyeshuri, cyari kugaragaza ko hari ihinduka rikomeye mu politiki n'imikorere by'ishami ry'Uburezi. Mu mpera z'Ugushyingo 2025, ikiganiro cyakwirakwijwe ku mbuga nkoranyambaga cy'uko Minisiteri y'Uburezi yari yasubiyemo gahunda z'uburezi n'izindi mpamyabumenyi z'amashuri kugira ngo zisabwe mu cyerekezo cy'"impamyabumenyi z'umwuga".Ibyo byatangajwe ko byatangiriye gukwirak

claim: "Uyu mugabane ntabwo ari ubukungu bw'amadolari miliyari 188  ahubwo ni ubukungu bw'amadolari miliyari 350".
evidence: Mu kiganiro yagiranye na Arise News TV muri Nyakanga 2025, Tope F, umujyanama w'umuyobozi wa Nigeria mu by'ubukungu, yasabye ko habaho ingengo y'imari nini yo kurwanya ubukene bukomeje no gushora imari mu bikorwa remezo, asaba ko igihugu "cyongera kwiyuhagira". Kugira ngo Fasua asobanure ikibazo cye, yavuze ko hari ihinduka rikomeye mu mikorere y'ubukungu bwa Nigeria, mu bihe bya vuba aha, ndetse n'ibice by'ibanze by'ubucuruzi bw'ibikomoka kuri peteroli (GDP) yafashe icyemezo cy'uko hari umubare muto w'abantu bafashe ingengo y'imari y'igihugu.

claim: Amazi y'ibyatsi bya Betel arimo ibibabi ashobora guhangana n'indwara yo mu kanwa.
evidence: Uretse kuba ubutumwa bwa Instagram buvuga ngo "Itariki, inyungu nyinshi! igizwe n'umushinga urimo imbaraga z'ubuzima nyakuri", butangaza ko iyi recipe ifite ubushobozi bwo gukumira ikibazo cy'ubushyuhe, icyorezo, ubukana n'ibibazo byo mu mirire. Uretse kuba ubutumwa bwa Instagram bushyigikira uburyo bwo guteka bwiteguye n'ibyatsi n'ibyatsi byo mu kanwa ku bibazo bitandukanye by'ubuzima, cyane cyane ubumuga bwo mu kanwa.

claim: Muri Werurwe 2026, Umufaransa wari ufite inshingano z'ubuyobozi muri NATO, Gen Michel Yakovleff, yavuze ko gufasha U Bufaransa gufasha Amerika gucunga inyanja ya Hormuz byari kuba bingana no "guhaha amatike y'ubwato bwa Titanic ku giciro gito".
evidence: Nyuma y'ibyumweru bibiri Amerika itangiye intambara yo kurwanya Iran, ikiganiro cyatangiye gukwirakwira ko Général Michel Yakovleff w'Umufaransa, wari ufite umwanya ukomeye mu butegetsi muri NATO, yavuze ko kugira ngo u Bufaransa bufashe Amerika gukingira inyanja ya Hormuz ku bitero bya Irani, byari kuba bimeze nko "guhaha amatike meza y'ubwato bwa Titanic", ubwato bw'ubusabusa bwageze ku gisozi maze burohama mu rugendo rwabwo bwa mbere buva mu Bwongereza bugana i New York City mu mwaka wa 1912.Ibitabo byinshi byo kuri interineti byavuze ko ari byo, harimo no kuri Facebook.Ibitabo bimwe byo kuri X byanditseho videwo y'iminota itatu ya Yakovleff ivuga ko yakiriye iyo ngendo kuri televiziyo y'u Bufaransa (bishingiyeho ibisobanuro): Iyo nkuru yasobanuye mu magambo make iti: "Général Yakovleff w'Umufaransa wari umaze igihe gito mu kiruhuko yavuye mu gisirikare ku butegetsi, ntiyagombye kwifatanya n'ishyirahamwe rya Trump ryo kubyina kuri Hormuz: igihe ntikigera cyo gutangaza itike

claim: "Uganda ifite abinjira, abagera kuri miliyoni 1.2 z'abashyitsi baza".
evidence: Mu buryo bunyuranye n'ubwo, Gregory Mugisha Muntu yari afite ukuri mu kuvuga ko 70% by'Abanyuganda bishingira ku buhinzi, ariko yanenze umubare w'abashyitsi bageraga muri Uganda kugira ngo bagarure impaka bari bafitanye n'abaturanyi babo bo muri Afurika y'Iburasirazuba na Tanzaniya. Frank Bulira Kabinga wa Kenya yavuze ibintu bitari byo ku birebana na Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Abarabu, harimo n'umushahara w'abimukira b'Abanyugipine. Joseph Elton Mabirizi yanenze urugero rw'ingabo za Uganda z'abapolisi n'abasirikare. Ku itariki ya 30 Ugushyingo 2025, abakinnyi batanu mu munani ba Perezida ba Uganda mu matora rusange yo mu mwaka wa 2026 bifuzaga kujya mu biganiro bya televiziyo, bagaragaza ko bafite intego yo gusura igihugu cyabo cyo muri Afurika y'Iburasirazuba.

claim: George Stephanopoulos, ukorera kuri ABC ikiganiro "This Week", yahagaritse ikiganiro yagiranye na Visi Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika JD Vance nyuma y'uko Vance yafashe ikibazo cy'umwami w'umupaka Tom Homan.
evidence: Ku itariki ya 12 Ukwakira 2025, ku kiganiro cya ABC cya "This Week", aho Visi Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika J.D. Vance yagaragaye, byaje kurangira mu buryo butunguranye mu kiganiro cyavugaga ku mutegetsi w'umupaka wo mu Nzu y'Abanyamerika Tom Homan, wahawe igihembo cy'amadolari 50.000 y'amadolari y'Amerika ngo afashe abakozi b'inyuma y'ubutegetsi "kwishyura amasezerano ya leta mu gihe cy'ubutegetsi bwa Trump bwa kabiri", nk'uko bivugwa n'ikinyamakuru cya MSNBC cyasohotse muri Nzeri. Muri icyo kiganiro, Vance yasubiyemo ibibazo by'umunyamakuru George Stephan Vopoulos ku birebana n'ibyo yari azi kuri Homan n'ibihembo byatangajwe, kugira ngo avuge ku kibazo cyabayeho cyo gusenyuka kwa leta ya Amerika, Vance akaba yarashinje Demokarasi.

claim: Abakozi bo mu Bwongereza badashobora gukora mu bice byo ku rwego rwa 3 bazabona uburyo bwo gushyigikira akazi n'ubwishingizi rusange, bizabafasha kubona 80% by'umushahara wabo.
evidence: Kugira ngo umuntu asabwe gukora, agomba gukora nibura 33% by'amasaha asanzwe afite kugira ngo akazi kabonwe ko gikwiriye kandi bityo akaba ashobora guhabwa ingororano muri iyi gahunda. Nyuma yaho Leta izajya yishyura kimwe cya gatatu cy'amasaha atarakorwa (kugeza ku gihagararo), umukoresha na we agatanga ikindi cya gatatu. Igihagararo cy'icya gatatu kitarishyurwa ni umushahara umukozi atanga muri iyi gahunda. Ibi bisobanura ko umukozi abona 77% y'umushahara usanzwe we aho umushahara wa Leta utari warashyizweho imipaka.

claim: Umukuru w'umutekano ushinzwe umutekano muri Minisiteri y'umutekano w'igihugu cya Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika kuva muri Werurwe 2026 yitwaga Iwona B. Horyn.
evidence: Mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa Gashyantare 2026, abasomyi ba Snopes bashakishije urubuga rwa interineti bashaka amakuru yerekeye umuntu bivugwa ko yitwaga Iwona B. Horyn, bamwe bavuga ko yari umukozi mukuru w'umutekano w'ikigo cya Amerika gishinzwe umutekano mu gihugu.Ibyo bitekerezo, byakwirakwiriye ku rubuga rwa interineti kuva mu mpera z'Ugushyingo 2025, byaje kugaruka nyuma y'aho Horyn avugwaho mu gice cyo mu kiganiro cy'imyidagaduro cyo mu gicuku cya nyuma cya televiziyo "Jimmy Kimmel Live".Kimmel yakoresheje amagambo asa n'aho ari mu izina rya Horyn ("I wanna be whorin'") nk'umwimerere wo gutangiza igice kigaragaza abandi bantu "b'amatsiko" bafite amazina.Icyo gice kirashobora kwerekanwa kuri YouTube aho igice kiboneka gitangira ahagana saa 14:00 z'ijoro.Ibyo byatumye abakoresha ba Instagram (aributse) bakwirakwiza amafoto y'umukozi wa DHS, kandi nk'uko bivugwa ko ari mu itangazamakuru rya mbere rya DHS, aho hantu hantu hantu havuzwe

claim: Leta ya Edo muri Nijeriya ifite umubare w'abatararimo akazi w'19%.
evidence: Imibare mishya yatanzwe n'ibiro bishinzwe imibare ya Nigeria (NBS) igaragaza ko igipimo cy'ubushomeri cyagabanutseho 6,1 ku ijana bitewe n'ibikorwa byakozwe n'ubuyobozi bw'Umuyobozi Godwin Obaseki, aho hashyizweho ikigo cy'ishami gishinzwe guhanga imirimo, Edo State Skills Development Agency (EdoJobs), gihabwa amahirwe yo guhanga imirimo irenga 170,000 binyuze mu gahunda z'ubushakashatsi mu myaka itatu n'igice ishize.

claim: Ababyeyi ba Melania Trump baje muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika binyuze mu muryango w'abashyigikiye, nanone witwa "impunzi z'abashinjacyaha".
evidence: Kuva mu butegetsi bwa mbere bwa Perezida Donald Trump, abantu benshi bagiye batekereza ku mimerere y'abimukira b'ababyeyi ba Melania Trump n'uko bageze muri Amerika. Ibinyamakuru byinshi byo kuri interineti byavugaga ko bageze muri iyi gahunda Trump ubwe yasetse kandi agashaka kuyihanganira. Videwo yo kuri YouTube yo muri Nyakanga 2025 yavuze ibi bikurikira: Donald Trump yubatse uruhande rw'urugomo rw'abimukira ku bw'ubugome bw'abimukira, imyanya y'imbohe, guhungabana n'abantu, n'amasasu. Ariko inyuma y'ibitaramo, yakoresheje "imigare y'abimukira" yari yarayise amadayimoni kugira ngo ajye kwinjiza umuryango we mu gihugu, mu gihe abana b'abazungu bari barashimuswe n'ababyeyi babo bakaguma mu gihugu cyabo kandi bakinjizwa mu gihugu cyabo. Mu gihe cy'ubutegetsi bwe bwa mbere, Trump yagerageje rwose kugabanya iterabwo ry'ibyo yise "imigare", abiteza ku mutekano w'igihugu.

claim: Ubushinwa buteganya kubuza telefoni za Samsung gukoresha porogaramu ya spyware ya Israel idashobora kuvanwaho.

claim: Ibigo by'ikoranabuhanga bizaba biherereye muri leta ya New York, bizajya bikoresha ingufu zisaga kabiri iz'imiryango yose yo muri leta yose.

claim: Muri Werurwe 2026, Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Donald Trump, yavuze ku birebana n'umutegetsi w'ikirenga wa Arabiya Sawudite, Mohammed bin Salman, ati "Ntabwo yatekerezaga ko azansoma".
evidence: Ku birebana n'iki gitekerezo videwo yasohotse kuri interineti muri Werurwe 2026 igaragaza ko Perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Donald Trump yavuze ko Umwamikazi Mohammed bin Salman w'u Bufaransa "atekereza ko yari gusomana n'umwami w'ubwami bwanjye". Iyo videwo yakwirakwijwe ku mbuga nyinshi, kandi abakoresha benshi mu bitekerezo bagaragaje ko bashidikanya ko iyo videwo ari iy'ukuri, bavuga ko ishobora kuba yarakozwe hakoreshejwe ubwenge bw'ibushushanyo. Abasomyi basabye Snopes ko yemeza ibyo bavuga.
